description: A full-scene concept/mockup illustration of a cozy farm village rendered in a soft cartoon (non-pixel) storybook style, shown from a high-angle isometric-ish perspective. It depicts tilled crop plots (carrots, radishes, leafy greens, wheat), a highlighted glass-roofed wooden greenhouse selected with a green glow, dirt paths, wooden fences, a well, a barn, cottages, orchard and pine trees, flowers, and a distant village with rolling hills. UI elements include a settings gear (top-right) and a round 'Shop' basket button (bottom-left). This is a mood/target-look reference mockup, not an in-game pixel-art asset.

A plump white hen bent forward pecking at the ground, drawn in the soft storybook cartoon style with creamy white feathers, a red comb and wattle, and orange feet. The bird faces right in a head-down eating pose on a fully transparent background. Transparent-keyed deliverable sprite suitable as the chicken's eat/peck animation frame in the farm world.

Single white chicken standing in an idle pose, facing left, with a red comb and wattle, small yellow beak and legs, drawn in soft storybook cartoon style with gentle shading on a transparent background. Plump friendly body with a slightly lifted tail. Deliverable sprite for the farm's idle chicken animal.

A black-and-white Holstein dairy cow with its head lowered to graze, munching a tuft of green grass, rendered in the soft cartoon illustration style with cream body, black patches, and pink udder and muzzle. The cow faces left in a grazing stance on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable sprite for the cow's eat/graze animation state in pastures.

A cute black-and-white spotted dairy cow standing upright and alert with head raised, pink muzzle, small horns, and a gentle expression in the soft storybook cartoon style. Shown in a three-quarter left-facing standing pose on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable sprite for the cow's idle/standing animation state in the pasture.

Large 1920x1080 tileable-looking ground texture of a lush grassy meadow, painted in a soft storybook style with layered green brushstroke grass blades and scattered tiny white and yellow wildflowers. Dense, top-down flat texture with no horizon or objects, mid-to-bright greens throughout. Suitable as the base ground/terrain backdrop for the farm playfield.

1920x1080 storybook landscape backdrop showing a pale blue sky with puffy white cartoon clouds over gentle rolling green hills, small rounded trees, and a faint distant farmhouse or windmill on the horizon. Soft watercolor-like cartoon rendering in light blues and greens, wide horizontal composition. Ideal as a distant sky/horizon parallax layer behind the farm scene.

Transparent-background sprite of a cozy bakery building shown at a slight three-quarter angle: a small cottage with cream-white plaster walls, a steep brown shingled roof, a smoking chimney, and warm yellow-lit windows. A round bread or pretzel signage detail marks the arched front door, giving it a welcoming village-shop feel. Storybook soft-cartoon style deliverable, ready for placement as a town/farm structure in Sprout Valley.

A classic red gambrel-roofed barn with weathered wooden plank walls, large cross-braced double doors, a gray shingled roof, hay-loft window, and a small cupola with weathervane on top, in the warm storybook illustration style. Viewed from a slight three-quarter angle on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable building sprite for a storage or livestock barn structure on the farm map.

A rustic red-brown wooden chicken coop rendered in the game's soft storybook illustration style, with a shingled gable roof, a small weathervane on top, an upper hen door and a slanted access ramp with rungs leading to the ground. Warm timber tones with darker plank detailing and a cozy hand-painted feel, on a transparent background. Ready-to-use building sprite for placing the chicken coop on the farm map.

Isometric-angled rectangular pasture enclosure on a transparent background: a grassy green field bordered by a rustic wooden post-and-rail fence with an earthen base. Soft cartoon shading in greens and warm browns. Deliverable sprite for the cow pasture / animal pen placed on the farm map.

Original generation of the fenced grassy cow pasture, shown on a solid blue-violet background. Same isometric wooden-fenced green field as the keyed deliverable; the blue backdrop is from generation. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the fenced cow pasture, with the grassy wooden-railed enclosure on a flat bright blue chroma background. Matches the keyed deliverable's art; the blue screen is only for keying. Intermediate processing file.

A charming dairy barn in soft cartoon storybook style with a blue shingled roof, whitewashed and weathered wood plank walls, big barn doors, and metal milk cans and a barrel sitting outside. Cool blue roof contrasts with cream and tan siding; three-quarter front view on a transparent background. Deliverable building sprite for the dairy/cow barn placed on the farm.

Transparent-background sprite of a rustic feed mill building in soft storybook style: a tall weathered wooden barn-like structure with a gambrel roof, an open front bay with hay loft, and a metal grain hopper/silo attachment with piping on the right side. Muted tan and gray wood tones sit on a small sandy dirt patch base, suited for placement as a farm production building.

A cozy half-timbered cottage with cream stucco walls, exposed brown wood beams, a warm terracotta shingle roof, an arched front door, small windows, and a stone chimney puffing soft gray smoke, all in the soft storybook cartoon style. Shown at a gentle three-quarter angle sitting on a small grassy base, on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable sprite for the player's farmhouse/home building.

A tall cylindrical grain silo with warm brown wooden-slat walls banded by metal hoops, a shiny silver domed metal cap, and a small arched access door at the base, rendered in the soft cartoon illustration style. Vertical tower orientation on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable building sprite for grain/feed storage on the farm.

A 3-cell horizontal growth-stage sheet for the corn crop on a transparent background: a tiny green sprout in a soil mound, a mid-height leafy corn stalk, and a mature tall stalk with golden ears of corn. Soft painterly cartoon style with rich greens and warm yellow corn, each stage rooted in a small brown dirt mound. This is the deliverable sprite sheet for animating corn growth in the field.

Original raw generation of the corn growth-stage strip on a solid teal-blue background: three stages from sprout to mid stalk to mature golden-eared corn, arranged left to right. Same storybook painterly style as the keyed version but with the flat colored backdrop still present. Intermediate source file, not for direct in-game use.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the corn growth-stage strip: the three corn stages (sprout, mid stalk, mature with golden ears) on a flat bright blue keying background. Used as the input for background removal to produce the keyed deliverable. Not intended for direct use in the game.

A 3-cell horizontal growth-stage sheet for the potato crop on a transparent background: a bare dirt mound with a tiny sprout, a small dark-green leafy plant, and a full bushy mature potato plant. Soft cartoon illustration style with deep greens over rounded brown soil mounds. Deliverable sprite sheet for showing potato growth in tilled plots.

Original raw generation of the potato growth-stage strip on a solid teal background, showing three cells from freshly planted mound to bushy mature potato plant. Same storybook art style as the deliverable but with the flat backdrop intact. Intermediate source file preceding chroma keying.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the potato growth stages: sprout mound, young plant, and mature leafy bush laid out horizontally on a flat bright blue keying background. Input for background removal; not a game-ready asset.

A 3-cell horizontal growth-stage sheet for the soybean crop on a transparent background: a small sprout, a mid-size leafy seedling, and a fuller mature bushy soybean plant, each growing from a brown soil mound. Soft painterly greens in the game's cozy storybook style. Deliverable sprite sheet for soybean field growth animation.

Original raw generation of the soybean growth-stage strip on a solid light slate-blue background, three stages from sprout to mature bush arranged left to right with visible framed cells. Storybook cartoon style; intermediate source file before chroma processing.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the soybean growth stages on a flat bright blue keying background: sprout, mid plant, and mature leafy soybean bush each on a dirt mound. Used to derive the transparent keyed deliverable; not for in-game use.

A 3-cell horizontal growth-stage sheet for the wheat crop on a transparent background: a small green sprout, a mid-growth tuft of green blades, and a mature clump of golden wheat stalks with heavy seed heads. Warm golds and soft greens in the cozy storybook illustration style. Deliverable sprite sheet for wheat growth in plots.

Original raw generation of the wheat growth-stage strip on a solid teal background with visible cell framing: sprout, green grassy mid stage, and ripe golden wheat. Same soft painterly style as the keyed deliverable; intermediate source file only.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the wheat growth stages on a flat bright blue keying background: sprout mound, green mid-stage tuft, and mature golden wheat clump laid out horizontally. Input for background removal, not a game-ready sprite.

A single round gold coin icon with a soft bronze-orange rim and an embossed five-pointed star in the center, rendered with glossy highlights in the game's soft cartoon style. Transparent background deliverable. Ideal as the currency icon for money displays, prices, and shop UI.

Original raw generation of the gold star coin icon on a solid dark purple background. Bright glossy gold coin with embossed star, chunky rounded outline. Intermediate source file preceding the chroma screen and keyed versions.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the gold star coin icon on a flat bright green keying background. Same glossy gold coin with embossed star as the deliverable. Used only for background removal, not for in-game display.

A horizontal 4-cell icon strip of harvested crop items on a transparent background: a golden ear of corn, a corn cob with husk leaves, pale wheat/soy pods, and a pair of brown potatoes. Small chunky icons with soft outlines in the storybook cartoon style. Deliverable icon sheet for inventory, shop, and delivery-order UI representing crop produce.

Original raw generation of the 4-cell crop icon strip (corn, husked corn/wheat, pods, potatoes) on a solid hot-pink/magenta background. Same chunky soft-outlined icon style as the deliverable. Intermediate source file only.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the 4-cell crop icon strip on a flat bright blue keying background, showing the corn, grain, pod, and potato item icons in a row. Input for background removal; not a game-ready asset.

Two burlap animal-feed sack icons side by side on a transparent background: one tan sack marked with a white feather (chicken feed) and one marked with black-and-white cow spots (cattle/dairy feed), both open at the top showing golden grain. Warm browns with stitched detailing in the soft cartoon style. Deliverable icons for feed items in inventory or animal-care UI.

Original raw generation of the two feed sack icons (feather-marked chicken feed and cow-spot dairy feed) on a solid teal background with visible framing. Same burlap-sack cartoon style as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the two burlap feed sack icons (chicken feed with feather, cattle feed with cow spots) on a flat bright blue keying background. Used to produce the transparent keyed version; not for direct in-game use.

Transparent-background sprite strip (2048x512, four cells) of farm goods icons in soft cartoon style: a white egg, a slender glass bottle of milk, a small round hen or butter-yellow item, and a golden-brown loaf of bread or pie. Clean keyed deliverable version with outlined, gently shaded illustrations. Use for inventory, shop, or HUD icons of sellable farm produce.

Original raw generation (2048x512) of the four farm goods icons — egg, milk bottle, hen/butter item, and bread/pie — drawn on a solid purple background. Same soft storybook icon art as the keyed version but not background-removed. Intermediate source file; prefer the keyed-ffmpeg variant for in-game use.

Chroma-screen intermediate (2048x512) of the four farm goods icons — egg, milk bottle, hen/butter item, and bread/pie — composited onto a flat bright green screen background for keying. Same cartoon icon artwork as the raw and keyed versions. Pipeline intermediate, not a deliverable sprite.

Transparent-background sprite strip (1024x256, four cells) of seed packet or seed pouch icons in muted tan and brown tones, each a small drawstring bag or packet with subtle variations for different crop seeds. Soft cartoon outlines with light shading, faint and low-contrast against the checkerboard. Use as inventory/shop icons for purchasable crop seeds.

Raw generation of a horizontal 4-cell seed icon strip on a solid hot-pink/magenta background, showing four small seed packet/pouch icons for the different crops. Tiny chunky icons in the soft cartoon style; this raw variant is the source file (no keyed deliverable is in this sheet). Intended to become inventory/shop icons for purchasable seeds.

Intermediate chroma-screen version of the seed icon strip: a 4-in-a-row horizontal sheet (1024x256, four 256px cells) of small storybook-style seed packet/pouch icons for the four crop seed types (wheat, corn, potato, soybean), each drawn as a tiny tan sack or packet with sprout/grain details in warm gold-brown tones. Icons sit on a flat blue chroma screen background kept for re-keying; use the keyed variant (icons-seeds-keyed-ffmpeg.png) for in-game UI such as shop and inventory slots.

Transparent-background sprite strip (1536x512, three cells) of farm tool icons in soft cartoon style: a curved-blade scythe or hoe, a short-handled axe or hammer, and a green watering can or trowel. Wooden brown handles with gray metal heads, outlined and gently shaded. Use as toolbar/hotbar or inventory icons for the player's farming tools.

Original raw generation (1536x512) of the three farm tool icons — hoe/scythe, axe, and watering can/trowel — on a solid hot-pink/magenta background. Same storybook tool artwork as the keyed deliverable but not background-removed. Intermediate source file; use the keyed-ffmpeg version in-game.

Chroma-screen intermediate (1536x512) of the three farm tool icons — hoe/scythe, axe, and watering can/trowel — on a flat bright green screen background prepared for chroma keying. Identical cartoon tool art to the raw and keyed variants. Pipeline intermediate, not a deliverable sprite.

A horizontal 3-cell strip of round white speech/thought bubbles on a transparent background, each with a small tail and containing a request icon: a feed sack, a framed crate/item picture, and a wheat or crop item. Clean white bubbles with soft gray outlines in the cozy cartoon style. Deliverable UI sprites for animals or NPCs requesting items above their heads.

Original raw generation of the three request speech bubbles on a solid bright magenta background, each white bubble containing an item icon (feed sack, crate, crop). Intermediate source file preceding chroma keying.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the three white request speech bubbles on a flat bright blue keying background. Same bubble-and-icon layout as the deliverable strip. Used only for background removal.

A wide rectangular UI panel with a warm brown wooden frame, a cream/parchment inner area, and a small circular badge centered on the top edge, on a transparent background. Rounded corners and soft storybook styling matching the game's wood-and-parchment UI language. Deliverable backdrop for the delivery-order board or a dialog/menu panel.

Original raw generation of the wooden delivery panel with cream interior and top badge, on a solid bright green background. Same warm wood-framed panel design as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the wooden delivery panel (brown frame, cream interior, small circular top badge) on a flat bright blue keying background. Input for producing the transparent keyed panel; not a game-ready asset.

A rounded-square item card frame on a transparent background: a dark brown/near-black slab with softly rounded corners and a subtle darker inner well, like an empty inventory slot. Simple and neutral so item icons can be composited on top. Deliverable UI element for shop or inventory item cards and slot backgrounds.

Original raw generation of the dark rounded-square item card/slot on a solid bright magenta background. Same dark brown slab with rounded corners as the deliverable. Intermediate source file preceding keying.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the dark rounded-square item card/slot on a flat bright green keying background. Used to derive the transparent keyed version; not for direct use in-game.

A horizontal wooden level widget on a transparent background: a rounded brown pill-shaped bar with a circular bronze star badge anchored at its left end, in the game's warm wood-toned UI style. The long bar area is meant to hold XP progress fill or a level number readout. Deliverable HUD element for showing player level and experience.
Original raw generation of the wooden level widget (star badge plus pill-shaped bar) on a solid dark gray background. Same warm brown wood styling as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the wooden level widget with circular star badge and horizontal bar, on a flat bright green keying background. Input for background removal only, not a game-ready asset.

A circular lock badge on a transparent background: a glossy red-orange round medallion with a raised rim and a silver-gray padlock in the center, drawn with soft shiny highlights in the cartoon style. Reads instantly as locked or unavailable. Deliverable UI overlay for locked crops, buildings, or shop items not yet unlocked.
Original raw generation of the red circular padlock badge on a solid bright cyan background. Same glossy red medallion with silver padlock as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the red circular lock badge with silver padlock on a flat bright green keying background. Used only to produce the transparent keyed version.

A horizontal money/currency widget on a transparent background: a dark rounded capsule (pill) with a warm brown outline and a circular coin socket at the left end, styled to match the wooden HUD elements. The dark oval area is intended to display the player's coin total, with the coin icon composited into the left circle. Deliverable HUD element for the money counter.
Original raw generation of the dark capsule money widget with left coin socket, on a solid bright green background. Same brown-outlined pill design as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the dark capsule money widget with circular coin socket on a flat bright blue keying background. Input for background removal only; not a game-ready asset.

A slim horizontal progress bar track on a transparent background: a long rounded-end capsule with a thin outline and an empty pale interior, rendered in the soft cartoon UI style. Neutral enough to be tinted or filled with a colored fill bar at runtime. Deliverable UI element for crop growth timers, order progress, or loading meters.
Original raw generation of the slim rounded progress bar track on a solid light sky-blue background. Same empty capsule-shaped bar as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.
Chroma-screen intermediate of the slim horizontal progress bar track on a flat bright blue keying background. Used to derive the transparent keyed bar; not for direct in-game use.

A golden-brown woven wicker basket with a rounded arched handle, drawn with warm honey tones and soft crosshatch weave detail in the storybook cartoon style, on a transparent background. Reads as a shopping or harvest basket. Deliverable glyph for the shop/market button or store icon in the HUD.
Original raw generation of the woven wicker shopping basket glyph on a solid bright cyan background. Same warm golden basket with arched handle as the keyed deliverable. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the wicker shopping basket glyph on a flat bright green keying background. Input for background removal to produce the transparent keyed shop icon; not a game-ready asset.

Large square shop panel frame with a rustic wooden border and a soft parchment/cream inner area, rendered in the game's soft storybook cartoon style on a transparent background. The wood corners have plank-and-nail detailing in warm browns, and the empty interior is ready to host item cards and shop content. Deliverable sprite for the shop/store menu window backdrop.

Original generation of the wooden shop panel frame with cream interior, shown on a solid magenta background. Same rustic plank border and parchment center as the keyed deliverable; the magenta is a chroma backdrop, not part of the art. Intermediate source file, not for direct in-game use.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the wooden shop panel frame, with the art on a flat bright green screen background. Identical rustic wood-and-parchment panel to the keyed version, awaiting or paralleling background removal. Intermediate processing file, not a deliverable.

Pair of rounded tab buttons on a transparent background: one warm orange/tan (active) and one muted gray (inactive), both with soft cartoon shading and gentle highlights. Wide, pill/lozenge-shaped tabs sized for the top of a menu panel. Deliverable sprite for switching sections in the shop or other tabbed UI.

Original generation of the two rounded tab buttons (gold-orange active tab and dark gray inactive tab) on a solid dark navy background. Same soft cartoon styling as the keyed deliverable; the navy field is the generation backdrop. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the tab button pair, with the orange active tab and gray inactive tab on a flat bright green screen. Matches the keyed deliverable's art; the green exists only for background keying. Intermediate processing file.

Horizontal tool menu / hotbar strip on a transparent background: a cream rounded panel with a thin wooden trim containing three empty circular slots. Soft storybook cartoon shading in warm tans and browns. Deliverable sprite for the player's tool selection bar, with tool icons composited into the round sockets.

Original generation of the three-slot tool menu bar (cream panel with wooden edge and three circular sockets) on a solid bright cyan background. Same art as the keyed deliverable; cyan is the generation backdrop. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the three-slot tool menu bar, cream panel with round slots on a flat bright green screen background. Identical to the keyed deliverable's art; green is only for keying. Intermediate processing file.

Transparent-background sprite of an open wooden delivery crate viewed from a three-quarter isometric angle, built from slatted planks with corner posts and a small paper label or tag tacked to the front. The empty bin interior is visible, in warm brown storybook-cartoon wood tones, ready to serve as a drop-off/shipping container prop in the farm world.

A rectangular patch of tilled dark-brown soil with horizontal furrow rows and a slightly raised, softly rounded border edge, drawn in the storybook cartoon style with warm earthy browns. Shown in a shallow top-down perspective on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable tile for a plantable farm plot where crops are sown and grown.

A horizontal strip of sandy tan dirt path with lightly speckled texture and softly irregular edges, in the muted warm palette of the storybook cartoon style. A simple wide, flat road segment on a transparent background. Keyed deliverable tile for laying dirt roads or walking paths between farm areas.

Large mature deciduous tree on a transparent background, with a thick gnarled brown trunk and a broad, lumpy canopy of rich green foliage clusters in soft storybook cartoon shading. Wide, roughly symmetrical silhouette with dappled highlight blobs on the leaves. Deliverable sprite for big choppable/decorative trees scattered around the farm world.

Original generation of the large leafy tree with thick trunk and dense green canopy, on a solid pale lavender/light purple background. Same art as the keyed deliverable; the lavender is the generation backdrop. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the large tree, showing the broad green canopy and gnarled trunk on a flat bright blue chroma background. Identical to the keyed deliverable's art; blue screen for keying only. Intermediate processing file.

Small young tree on a transparent background, with a slender brown trunk, a modest rounded green canopy, and a soft shadow/grass patch at its base. Lighter and sparser than the large tree, in the same soft cartoon style. Deliverable sprite for a sapling or small decorative/choppable tree in the farm world.

Chopped tree stump on a transparent background: a wide brown stump with visible growth rings on its flat top, bark texture on the sides, and tufts of green grass around the base. Warm browns and oranges with soft storybook shading. Deliverable sprite for the remains after a tree is chopped down, or as a world obstacle/decoration.

Original generation of the tree stump with ringed top, bark sides, and grass tufts, on a solid magenta/pink background. Same art as the keyed deliverable; the pink field is the generation backdrop. Intermediate source file.

Chroma-screen intermediate of the tree stump, showing the ringed brown stump with grass at its base on a flat bright blue chroma background. Matches the keyed deliverable's art; blue screen exists only for keying. Intermediate processing file.

Flat vector blue triangular arrow pointing east (right), a solid rounded triangle in medium blue with a slightly darker outline. Clean cartoon UI style. Ideal for a 'next' button, carousel navigation, or increment control in menus.

Smaller 24px version of the flat blue east-pointing (right) triangular arrow with rounded corners. Same clean vector UI style. Suited to compact widgets like spinners, dropdown expanders, or small pagination controls.

Flat vector blue triangular arrow pointing north (up), a solid rounded triangle in medium blue. Clean cartoon UI style typical of Kenney assets. Useful for scroll-up buttons, value increment arrows, or upward navigation in menus.
Smaller 24px flat blue up-pointing triangular arrow with rounded corners. Same solid vector style as the larger version. Good for compact spinner/stepper up buttons or small scroll indicators.

Flat vector blue triangular arrow pointing south (down), a solid rounded inverted triangle in medium blue. Clean cartoon UI style. Common use: dropdown indicator, scroll-down button, or value decrement arrow.
Smaller 24px flat blue down-pointing triangular arrow with rounded corners. Solid vector style. Suited to dropdown carets, compact scroll-down controls, or stepper decrement buttons.

Flat vector blue triangular arrow pointing west (left), a solid rounded triangle in medium blue with darker outline. Clean cartoon UI style. Ideal for a 'back' or 'previous' button in menus and carousels.
Smaller 24px flat blue left-pointing triangular arrow with rounded corners. Same solid vector style. Good for compact back buttons, pagination, or spinner decrement controls.

Flat vector blue decorative arrow pointing east (right), shaped like a swept chevron/arrowhead with a concave back edge rather than a plain triangle. Medium blue with darker outline. Adds flair to 'next' navigation, level select, or directional prompts.
Smaller 24px version of the blue decorative east/right arrowhead with a swept, concave-backed chevron shape. Flat vector style. Suited to compact stylish next/forward indicators in menus.

Flat vector blue decorative arrow pointing north (up), an arrowhead with a notched/concave bottom edge giving a stylized chevron look. Medium blue with darker outline. Good for stylish scroll-up or upgrade indicators.
Smaller 24px blue decorative up-pointing arrowhead with a notched bottom edge, flat vector style. Suited to compact upward indicators, sort-ascending markers, or upgrade icons.

Flat vector blue decorative arrow pointing south (down), an inverted arrowhead with a notched/concave top edge forming a stylized chevron. Medium blue with darker outline. Useful for stylish scroll-down hints or sort-descending markers.
Smaller 24px blue decorative down-pointing arrowhead with a notched top edge, flat vector style. Good for compact dropdown or downward navigation accents.
Flat vector blue decorative arrow pointing west (left), a swept arrowhead/chevron with a concave back edge. Medium blue with darker outline. Adds visual flair to back/previous navigation buttons.
Smaller 24px blue decorative left-pointing swept arrowhead/chevron, flat vector style. Suited to compact stylish back/previous indicators in menus and carousels.

Wide rectangular UI button (192x64) with a light grey/white face and a solid blue border outline, flat vector style with slightly rounded corners. Reads as an unselected or secondary button state. Good as a menu button background or nine-slice panel for labels.

Wide rectangular button with a light grey/white face, blue border, and a 3D depth edge along the bottom giving a raised, pressable look. Flat vector style. Suits primary menu buttons where a physical push affordance is wanted.

Wide solid blue rectangular button with a darker blue depth edge at the bottom, giving a raised 3D pressable look. Flat vector style, rounded corners, no gloss. A strong default for primary action buttons like Play or Confirm.

Wide blue rectangular button with a bottom depth edge and a glossy highlight band across the upper half, flat vector cartoon style. The shine gives a shiny candy-like look. Good for playful primary buttons in menus.

Wide blue rectangular button with a bottom depth edge and a subtle vertical gradient from lighter to darker blue. Flat vector style with rounded corners. Suited to primary menu buttons with a softer shaded look.

Wide rectangular button with a pale grey/white face, thin blue line border, and a depth edge at the bottom for a raised look. Flat vector style. Works as a secondary or unfocused button variant alongside the solid blue versions.

Wide solid medium-blue rectangular button with rounded corners and no depth edge or gloss — completely flat vector style. A clean minimal button background, also usable as a header bar or nine-slice panel strip.

Wide blue rectangular button with a glossy lighter band across the top half, flat vector cartoon style, no depth edge. Gives a shiny plastic look. Good for hover/highlight states or playful menu buttons.

Wide blue rectangular button with a smooth vertical gradient (lighter top to darker bottom), rounded corners, no depth edge. Flat vector style. Useful as a softer-shaded button background or list-item bar.

Wide rectangular button with a pale grey/white face and a thin blue line border, flat with no depth edge. Flat vector style. Reads as an inactive, secondary, or outline-style button; also usable as a text input field background.

Circular UI button (64x64) with a light grey/white face and a thick blue ring border, flat vector style. Reads as an unselected round button or radio-style control. Good for icon buttons, map markers, or toggle indicators.
Circular button with a white/grey face, blue ring border, and a bottom depth edge giving a raised 3D coin-like look. Flat vector style. Suits pressable round icon buttons in HUDs or menus.

Solid medium-blue circular button with a darker blue depth edge at the bottom, giving a raised pressable appearance. Flat vector style, no gloss. A good base for round HUD action buttons with an icon overlaid.
Blue circular button with a bottom depth edge and a lighter glossy upper half, flat vector cartoon style. Shiny raised look like a candy button. Ideal for playful round action buttons in a game HUD.
Blue circular button with a bottom depth edge and a subtle vertical gradient shading. Flat vector style with a raised 3D feel. Works as a pressable round button base for icons in menus or HUDs.

Circular button with a pale grey/white face, thin blue line ring, and a light depth edge below, flat vector style. Reads as a raised secondary/inactive round button. Useful for toggles or unselected icon buttons.
Solid medium-blue circle with no depth, gloss, or border — a completely flat vector round button base. Clean and minimal; suited as a background disc for icons, radio buttons, or map pins.
Blue circular button with a lighter glossy top half creating a shiny plastic look, flat vector cartoon style, no depth edge. Good for highlighted or hover states of round icon buttons.
Blue circular button with a smooth vertical gradient from lighter to darker blue, flat vector style, no depth edge. A softly shaded round button base for icons or markers.

Circular button with a pale grey/white face and a thin blue line ring border, flat vector style, no depth. Reads as an outline/inactive round control, similar to an unchecked radio button. Useful for toggle or selection indicators.

Square UI button (64x64) with a light grey/white face and a solid blue border, rounded corners, flat vector style. Reads as an unselected square slot or secondary button. Good for inventory slots, checkboxes, or icon button frames.
Square button with a white/grey face, blue border, and a bottom depth edge giving a raised 3D look, flat vector style with rounded corners. Suits pressable square icon buttons or hotbar slots.

Solid medium-blue square button with rounded corners and a darker blue depth edge along the bottom, giving a raised pressable look. Flat vector style, no gloss. Strong base for square action buttons or toolbar keys.

Blue square button with a bottom depth edge and a lighter glossy band on the upper portion, flat vector cartoon style. Shiny raised keycap-like appearance. Good for playful square action buttons or virtual keyboard keys.

Blue square button with rounded corners, a bottom depth edge, and a subtle vertical gradient shading. Flat vector style with a raised feel. Useful for pressable square buttons in menus, hotbars, or on-screen keypads.

Square button with a pale grey/white face, thin blue line border, and a depth edge below for a raised look. Flat vector style with rounded corners. Reads as a secondary or empty-slot variant of the square depth buttons.

Solid medium-blue square with rounded corners and no depth, gloss, or border — a completely flat vector square button base. Minimal and clean; works for icon buttons, inventory slots, or tile backgrounds.

Blue square button with a lighter glossy band across the lower or upper half creating a shiny plastic look, flat vector cartoon style, no depth edge. Suited to highlighted/hover square button states or shiny UI tiles.
Blue square button with rounded corners and a smooth vertical gradient from lighter to darker blue, flat vector style, no depth edge. A softly shaded square base for icons or menu tiles.

Square button with a pale grey/white face and a thin blue line border, rounded corners, flat vector style with no depth. Reads as an outline/inactive square control, like an unchecked checkbox or empty slot frame.

A round checkbox/radio button in its filled (selected) state: a solid bright blue circle with a subtle white outer ring. Clean flat vector UI style from the Kenney UI pack. Suitable as the 'on/selected' state of a radio button or round toggle in menus and settings screens.

A round checkbox/radio button in its empty (unselected) state: a plain light grey/white filled circle with a white rim. Flat vector UI style. Use as the 'off/unselected' state of a radio button or round toggle paired with the colored variant.

A round radio button on a grey/white base with a smaller solid blue dot centered inside, indicating a selected radio option. Flat vector UI style with a white outer ring. Classic radio-button 'checked' visual for settings menus and option lists.

A solid blue round button with a white circle outline (ring) centered inside it. Flat vector UI style. Works as a selected radio button variant where the whole control is colored blue, or as a small circular indicator/toggle in a HUD.

A square checkbox base in bright blue with rounded corners and a subtle white outer border, with no glyph inside. Flat vector UI style. Serves as the colored empty checkbox background onto which a checkmark, cross, or square glyph state is shown.

A blue rounded-square checkbox containing a bold white checkmark (tick). Flat vector UI style with a white outer border. The standard 'checked/enabled' checkbox state for settings toggles, quest completion markers, or confirmation UI.

A blue rounded-square checkbox containing a bold white X (cross) glyph. Flat vector UI style. Represents a disabled/negative checkbox state, a 'no/off' toggle, or could serve as a close/cancel button in menus.

A blue rounded-square checkbox with a smaller white square outline centered inside. Flat vector UI style. Typically used as an indeterminate/partial checkbox state or an alternate selected-state marker for option lists.

An empty square checkbox in light grey/white with rounded corners and a white border, no glyph inside. Flat vector UI style. The neutral 'unchecked' checkbox base for settings and option menus, pairing with the blue checked variants.

A light grey/white rounded-square checkbox containing a blue checkmark (tick) with darker blue outline. Flat vector UI style. A 'checked' checkbox state on a light background, good for lists, settings toggles, and task/quest completion indicators.

A light grey/white rounded-square checkbox containing a blue X (cross) glyph with darker blue outline. Flat vector UI style. Represents a negative/disabled checkbox state or a 'no' selection marker; could also act as a small close button.

A light grey/white rounded-square checkbox with a smaller solid blue square centered inside. Flat vector UI style. Commonly used as an indeterminate/partially-checked checkbox state or an alternate filled-selection marker in option lists.

A standalone bold checkmark (tick) glyph in solid bright blue with a subtle darker blue edge, no background. Flat vector UI style, small icon size (20x18). Use to indicate success, completion, confirmation, or a 'yes' choice anywhere in the UI.

A small solid bright blue filled circle glyph with a faint darker outline, no background. Flat vector UI style, 16x16. Useful as a radio dot, bullet point, status indicator, pagination dot, or minimap marker.

A standalone bold X (cross) glyph in solid bright blue with a subtle darker edge, no background. Flat vector UI style, 18x18. Use as a close/cancel/delete icon, a 'no' indicator, or a failure marker in menus and dialogs.

A bold blue checkmark (tick) glyph with a thick white outline around it, giving it strong contrast on any background. Flat vector UI style, 20x18. Ideal as a success/complete badge overlaid on buttons, item slots, or quest entries.

A solid blue filled circle with a thick white outline ring, no background. Flat vector UI style, 16x16. Works as a high-contrast radio dot, bullet, selection indicator, or map/minimap marker that reads well over busy backgrounds.

A bold blue X (cross) glyph with a thick white outline around it for contrast. Flat vector UI style, 18x18. Use as a close/cancel/delete icon or failure badge that stays legible over colored or busy backgrounds.

A solid bright blue square with a thick white outline border, no background. Flat vector UI style, 16x16. Useful as a stop icon, a filled selection marker, a small tile/swatch, or a legend bullet in game UI.

A small solid bright blue square glyph with a darker blue border, no white outline. Flat vector UI style, 16x16. Works as a stop button icon, a filled checkbox glyph, a bullet, or a color swatch in menus.

A slider handle (grabber/thumb) shaped like a rounded-top shield or pointed tab, solid blue with a darker blue outline, 24x32 vertical orientation. Flat vector UI style. Drag handle for volume/brightness sliders or scrollbars in settings menus. (Filename 'hangle' is Kenney's typo for 'handle'.)

A long thin horizontal slider track in bright blue with rounded circular end caps and small dot terminals, 96x16. Flat vector UI style. Represents the filled portion of a slider bar for volume, brightness, or progress in settings menus.

A 16x16 blue slider track section: a bulged circular middle segment with short bar stubs on left and right, designed to tile/nine-slice as the middle of a horizontal slider. Flat vector UI style. Used to build custom-length filled slider tracks.

A 32x16 wide blue slider track section with a circular bulge in the center and bar extensions on both sides. Flat vector UI style. A wider tiling segment for assembling horizontal slider or progress tracks of arbitrary length.

A long thin horizontal slider track in white/light grey with rounded end caps and small dot terminals, 96x16. Flat vector UI style. Represents the empty/unfilled portion of a slider or progress bar, pairing with the blue colored track.

A 16x16 white/grey slider track section with a circular bulge in the middle and short bar stubs left and right. Flat vector UI style. Tiling middle segment for building unfilled horizontal slider tracks of custom length.

A 32x16 wide white/grey slider track section with a central circular bulge and bar extensions to both edges. Flat vector UI style. Wider tiling segment for the unfilled portion of horizontal sliders and progress bars.

A tall thin vertical slider track in bright blue with rounded circular end caps and small dot terminals, 16x96. Flat vector UI style. The filled portion of a vertical slider or gauge, e.g. a scrollbar or vertical volume control.

A 16x16 blue vertical slider track section: a circular bulge with short bar stubs above and below, meant to tile as the middle of a vertical slider. Flat vector UI style. Building block for custom-height filled vertical tracks.

A 16x32 tall blue vertical slider track section with a circular bulge in the center and bar extensions above and below. Flat vector UI style. Taller tiling segment for assembling vertical slider or gauge tracks of arbitrary height.

A tall thin vertical slider track in white/light grey with rounded end caps and small dot terminals, 16x96. Flat vector UI style. The empty/unfilled portion of a vertical slider or scrollbar, pairing with the blue filled variant.

A 16x16 white/grey vertical slider track section with a circular bulge and short bar stubs above and below. Flat vector UI style. Tiling middle segment for building unfilled vertical slider tracks of custom height.

A 16x32 tall white/grey vertical slider track section with a central circular bulge and bar extensions above and below. Flat vector UI style. Taller tiling segment for the unfilled portion of vertical sliders and gauges.

A five-pointed star filled solid bright blue with a darker blue outline, 64x60. Flat vector UI style. Classic rating/score star for level-complete screens, favorites markers, or achievement displays; this is the filled/earned state.

A five-pointed star in white/light grey with a white outline, 64x60 — the hollow/unearned counterpart to the blue filled star. Flat vector UI style. Use as the empty state in star ratings on level-select or results screens.

A five-pointed star in light grey with a subtle darker grey inner shade giving a slight depth/inset look, 64x60. Flat vector UI style. An alternate empty/placeholder star state for ratings, reading as a recessed socket awaiting a filled star.

A large solid blue triangular arrowhead pointing right (east), with a lighter blue inner face and darker rounded outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style from the Kenney 'Double' outlined set. Use as a next/forward button, page-right control, or directional prompt.

A smaller 48x48 version of the solid blue right-pointing (east) triangular arrow with lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact next/forward or play-style directional button for carousels, pagination, or D-pad style controls.

A large solid blue triangular arrowhead pointing up (north), with a lighter blue inner face and darker rounded outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style. Use as an up/scroll-up button, increase control, or upward directional prompt in menus or touch controls.

A smaller 48x48 solid blue up-pointing (north) triangular arrow with lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact up/increase button for spinners, scroll controls, or virtual D-pads.

A large solid blue triangular arrowhead pointing down (south), with a lighter blue inner face and darker rounded outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style. Use as a down/scroll-down button, decrease control, or downward directional prompt.

A smaller 48x48 solid blue down-pointing (south) triangular arrow with lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact down/decrease button for spinners, dropdowns, scroll controls, or virtual D-pads.

A large solid blue triangular arrowhead pointing left (west), with a lighter blue inner face and darker rounded outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style. Use as a back/previous button, page-left control, or leftward directional prompt.

A smaller 48x48 solid blue left-pointing (west) triangular arrow with lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact back/previous directional button for carousels, pagination, or virtual D-pads.

A stylized blue chevron-style arrow pointing right (east) with a notched/concave tail giving it a sleek dart shape, lighter inner face and darker outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style. A fancier next/forward indicator for menus, tutorials, or map direction markers.

A smaller 48x48 blue decorative right-pointing (east) dart/chevron arrow with a notched tail, lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact fancy forward/next indicator for lists, breadcrumbs, or pointer prompts.

A stylized blue dart/chevron arrow pointing up (north) with a notched concave base, lighter inner face and darker outline, 64x64. Flat vector UI style. A fancier upward indicator for scroll-to-top buttons, upgrade markers, or directional prompts.

A smaller 48x48 blue decorative up-pointing (north) dart/chevron arrow with a notched base, lighter inner face and darker outline. Flat vector UI style. Compact fancy up indicator for upgrade icons, scroll-to-top buttons, or stat-increase markers.

A chunky decorative arrowhead/chevron pointing south (downward), drawn in flat vector style with a bright cyan-blue fill and darker blue double outline. The shape is a stylized triangular point with a notched top edge, like a compass or map pointer. Useful as a scroll-down indicator, dropdown marker, or 'more below' hint in game menus.

A smaller variant of the decorative south-pointing arrowhead, flat vector style with bright cyan-blue fill and dark blue double border. Same notched triangular chevron shape pointing downward. Good as a compact scroll-down or expand indicator in tight UI layouts.

A chunky decorative arrowhead pointing west (left), flat vector style with bright cyan-blue fill and darker blue double outline. The notched chevron shape resembles a stylized 'back' pointer. Useful as a back button icon, carousel previous arrow, or page-left navigation element.

A smaller variant of the decorative west/left-pointing arrowhead, flat vector cyan-blue with dark blue double border. Same notched chevron silhouette pointing left. Fits compact back/previous navigation controls or list pagination in game menus.

A wide rectangular UI button in flat vector style: pale grey-white inner face framed by a thin cyan-blue border on a white outer edge. No depth/bevel, appears in an idle or outlined state. Suitable as a menu button, text input frame, or nine-slice panel background.

A wide rectangular button with a 3D depth effect: pale grey face with cyan-blue border sitting on a darker blue bottom edge that suggests thickness, flat vector style. Reads as a raised, pressable button in its unpressed state. Ideal for primary menu buttons with a tactile look.

A wide rectangular button filled solid cyan-blue with a darker blue bottom edge giving a 3D raised depth effect, flat vector style with no gloss or gradient. Clean and modern, suited for primary action buttons (Play, OK, Confirm) in a game menu.

A wide rectangular cyan-blue button with a raised depth edge and a lighter glossy highlight across the upper half, flat vector style. The shine gives a candy-like, clickable appearance. Good for prominent call-to-action buttons in arcade or casual game UIs.

A wide rectangular cyan-blue button with a raised bottom-edge depth and a subtle vertical gradient from lighter to darker blue across the face, flat vector style. Reads as an unpressed 3D button with soft shading. Useful for standard menu buttons wanting slight visual richness.

A wide rectangular button with pale grey-white face, thin cyan-blue line border, and a darker underside edge giving 3D depth, flat vector style. A light, outlined variant of the raised button. Works for secondary actions or toggled-off states next to solid blue primaries.

A wide flat rectangular button in solid cyan-blue with rounded corners and a slightly darker blue outline, no depth or gloss; pure flat vector style. Reads as a pressed or minimal-style button. Good as a nine-slice base for menu buttons, tabs, or labels.

A wide rectangular cyan-blue button with a lighter glossy sheen on the top half and darker lower half, flat vector style, no raised depth edge. The two-tone shine suggests a polished, clickable surface. Suits casual-game menu buttons or HUD bar backgrounds.

A wide rectangular button in cyan-blue with a smooth vertical gradient shading and rounded corners, flat vector style without a depth edge. Slightly softer look than the pure flat variant. Usable for menu buttons, list rows, or panel headers.

A wide rectangular button with a pale grey-white fill and a thin cyan-blue line border, flat vector style, no depth. Reads as an inactive, secondary, or outlined 'ghost' button. Also works as a text field or list entry background in menus.

A circular UI button with a pale grey-white center ringed by a cyan-blue border on a white outer edge, flat vector style, no depth. Suits round icon buttons (pause, settings, close) or radio-button style controls in a game HUD.

A circular button with grey-white face, cyan-blue ring border, and a darker blue bottom edge that creates a raised 3D depth effect, flat vector style. Reads as an unpressed round button. Good for tactile-feeling icon buttons in menus and HUDs.

A solid cyan-blue circular button with a darker blue lower edge giving a raised 3D depth look, flat vector style with no gloss. Clean round pressable control, ideal for action buttons like jump/attack on touch controls or icon buttons in menus.

A cyan-blue circular button with raised depth edge and a lighter glossy highlight on the upper half, flat vector style. The shine gives a candy-button feel. Suits prominent round action buttons in casual or arcade game interfaces.

A cyan-blue circular button with a raised bottom edge and soft vertical gradient shading across the face, flat vector style. An unpressed 3D round button with subtle depth. Works for icon buttons or touch controls needing gentle shading.

A circular button with pale grey-white face, thin cyan-blue ring outline, and darker underside edge for 3D depth, flat vector style. A light outlined variant of the raised round button. Good for secondary icon buttons or unselected radio-style options.

A plain solid cyan-blue circle with a slightly darker blue outline, flat vector style, no depth or gloss. Reads as a pressed or minimalist round button. Usable as an icon button base, radio dot, map marker, or token background.

A cyan-blue circular button split into a lighter glossy top half and darker bottom half, flat vector style without a depth edge. The sheen gives a shiny bubble-like appearance. Suits casual-game round buttons or collectible orb backgrounds.

A cyan-blue circular button with a smooth vertical gradient from lighter to darker blue, flat vector style, no depth edge. Softly shaded round control. Works as an icon button base or decorative circular badge in menus.

A circular button with pale grey-white fill and a thin cyan-blue ring outline plus white outer edge, flat vector style, no depth. Reads as an empty/unselected round control. Good for radio buttons, unselected toggles, or ghost-style icon buttons.

A square UI button with rounded corners, pale grey-white face framed by a cyan-blue border on a white outer edge, flat vector style, no depth. Ideal for inventory slots, icon button frames, or grid-based menu tiles.

A rounded square button with grey-white face, cyan-blue border, and darker blue bottom edge creating a raised 3D depth effect, flat vector style. Reads as an unpressed square key. Good for keyboard-key visuals, inventory slots, or tactile icon buttons.

A solid cyan-blue rounded square button with a darker blue lower edge giving raised 3D depth, flat vector style, no gloss. Clean pressable tile look. Suits action buttons, hotbar slots, or virtual keypad keys in a game UI.

A cyan-blue rounded square button with raised depth edge and a lighter glossy highlight across the top portion, flat vector style. Shiny candy-key appearance. Good for prominent square action buttons or level-select tiles in casual games.

A cyan-blue rounded square button with a raised bottom edge and soft vertical gradient shading, flat vector style. Unpressed 3D square control with gentle shading. Works for level tiles, inventory slots, or keypad buttons.

A rounded square button with pale grey-white face, thin cyan-blue line border, and darker underside edge for 3D depth, flat vector style. Light outlined variant of the raised square button. Suits secondary buttons or empty inventory slots.

A plain solid cyan-blue rounded square with a slightly darker outline, flat vector style, no depth or gloss. Reads as a pressed or minimal square button. Useful as an inventory slot base, tile background, or icon button in flat UIs.

A cyan-blue rounded square button with a lighter glossy top half and darker bottom half, flat vector style, no depth edge. Shiny two-tone tile look. Suits casual-game square buttons, level tiles, or app-icon style badges.

A cyan-blue rounded square button with a smooth vertical gradient shading, flat vector style, no depth edge. Softly shaded square control. Works as a tile background, icon button base, or grid menu cell.

A rounded square with pale grey-white fill and a thin cyan-blue line border on a white outer edge, flat vector style, no depth. Reads as an empty or unselected square control. Good for empty inventory slots, checkboxes at large size, or ghost buttons.

A round checkbox/radio control shown as a solid cyan-blue circle with a darker blue outline, flat vector style — the filled 'checked' colored state without an inner glyph. Suits radio buttons, toggle dots, or selection indicators in settings menus.

A round checkbox/radio control as a pale grey-white circle with soft grey outline, flat vector style — the empty/unchecked state. Pairs with the colored variant to show unselected options. Use for radio buttons or toggles in option screens.

A round radio button in grey/white with a dark-outlined cyan-blue filled circle in its center, flat vector style — a selected radio state with an inner dot on a grey ring. Ideal for radio-group option selection in settings or dialog UIs.

A round radio button drawn as a cyan-blue outer circle with a white ring and a solid cyan inner dot, flat vector style — a fully colored selected radio state. Good for the active option in a radio group or a target/record-style indicator.

A square checkbox as a solid cyan-blue rounded square with darker blue outline, flat vector style — the filled colored state with no inner glyph. Suits a checked-but-glyphless checkbox base or a selected tile marker in menus.

A cyan-blue rounded-square checkbox containing a bold white checkmark (tick), flat vector style with darker blue outline. Clearly reads as a checked/enabled state. Perfect for settings toggles, task completion markers, or confirm indicators.

A cyan-blue rounded-square checkbox containing a bold white X cross, flat vector style with darker blue outline. Reads as a negative, disabled, or 'crossed-off' state. Useful for cancel/close buttons, failed objectives, or excluded options.

A cyan-blue rounded-square checkbox with a smaller solid cyan square inset at its center against a white inner border, flat vector style. Reads as a partially-selected or indeterminate checkbox state, or a stop button. Useful for tri-state checkboxes or media stop controls.

A pale grey-white rounded square with soft grey outline, flat vector style — an empty/unchecked checkbox state with no glyph. Pairs with the colored checkbox variants. Use for unchecked settings toggles or empty selection boxes.

A grey-white rounded-square checkbox containing a cyan-blue checkmark with dark outline, flat vector style. A checked state on a light box — reads slightly softer than the fully colored version. Good for list item completion or accepted options.

A grey-white rounded-square checkbox containing a cyan-blue X cross with dark outline, flat vector style. Reads as a rejected, disabled, or failed state on a light box. Useful for declined options, failed checklist items, or close controls.

A grey-white rounded-square checkbox with a smaller solid cyan-blue square inset in the center, flat vector style with dark outline on the inner square. Reads as an indeterminate/partial checkbox or a stop icon on a light box. Suits tri-state checkboxes or media controls.

A standalone bold cyan-blue checkmark (tick) glyph with a darker blue outline, flat vector style, no background box. Reads as confirmation, success, or completion. Overlay it on buttons, checkboxes, quest logs, or use as a 'correct' feedback icon.

A small standalone solid cyan-blue filled circle with a darker blue outline, flat vector style, no background. A simple dot/bullet glyph. Useful as a radio-button fill, bullet point, notification dot, map marker, or pagination indicator.

A bold rounded X (cross) icon in bright sky blue with a darker blue outline, drawn in Kenney's clean flat vector UI style. Diagonal strokes with rounded ends form a chunky, friendly cancel mark. Suitable as a close button, cancel action, or incorrect-answer indicator in game menus.

A blue checkmark (tick) icon rendered as an outlined stroke with a white border around the blue check, in flat vector UI style. The rounded tick sweeps down-left then up-right. Useful for confirm buttons, completed tasks, toggled-on options, or correct-answer feedback.

A solid bright blue filled circle surrounded by a white outline ring, flat vector UI style. Simple round dot shape with no internal detail. Works as a radio-button selected state, status dot, map marker, or generic shape icon.

A bright blue rounded X (cross) icon with a thick white outline around it, flat vector UI style. Same chunky diagonal cross shape as the plain version but haloed in white for contrast on any background. Good as a close/cancel button icon or a wrong-answer marker.

A solid bright blue square with slightly rounded corners enclosed in a white outline border, flat vector UI style. Plain filled shape with no interior detail. Usable as a checkbox/selection state, stop button icon, or generic shape marker in UI.

A bright blue rounded square with a darker blue border, flat vector UI style with a subtle drop-shadow edge. Simple solid filled shape. Suitable as a stop icon, checkbox fill, tile marker, or abstract shape element in menus.

A blue slider handle (grabber) shaped like a rounded pentagon or upward-pointing shield/house, bright blue fill with a darker blue outline and inner highlight line, flat vector UI style. The pointed top marks the slider's current position. Used as the draggable thumb on a volume or settings slider.

A long thin horizontal blue slider track: a bright blue bar with rounded circular end caps, drawn as a line-and-dots barbell shape in flat vector style. Represents the filled/colored portion of a slider rail. Used as the track for horizontal volume, brightness, or setting sliders.

A single blue slider track section: a large bright blue circle with darker blue outline and short horizontal bar stubs extending left and right, flat vector UI style. It is a tileable middle segment/notch of a segmented horizontal slider. Combine with wide sections and end caps to build stepped slider rails.

A wide blue slider segment: a horizontal bright blue bar with a circular node in the center and connector stubs on both sides, flat vector style with darker blue outline. A tileable middle piece of a segmented/stepped horizontal slider. Useful for building discrete-step option sliders in settings menus.

A long thin horizontal slider track in white/light grey: a slim bar with small circular end caps, barbell-like, flat vector UI style. This is the unfilled/background version of the slider rail. Layer the blue color track over it to show slider fill progress.

A white/light grey slider section piece: a large white circle with grey outline and short horizontal bar stubs on either side, flat vector UI style. The unfilled counterpart of the blue slider section, a tileable notch segment. Used as the background step marker on segmented horizontal sliders.

A wide white/grey slider segment: a horizontal light bar with a central circular node and connector stubs, outlined in soft grey, flat vector style. Unfilled version of the wide blue section for stepped sliders. Tiles horizontally to form the empty portion of a discrete slider rail.

A tall thin vertical blue slider track: a bright blue line with small circular caps at top and bottom, flat vector UI style. The filled/colored rail for vertical sliders. Used for vertical volume bars, scroll indicators, or level gauges in menus.

A blue vertical slider section: a large bright blue circle with darker outline and short vertical bar stubs above and below, flat vector UI style. A tileable node segment for a stepped vertical slider. Combine to build discrete vertical option or level selectors.

A tall blue slider segment: a vertical bright blue bar with a circular node in the middle and connector stubs at top and bottom, dark blue outline, flat vector style. The wide/tall tileable middle piece of a segmented vertical slider. Useful for stepped vertical gauges or setting sliders.

A tall thin vertical slider track in white/light grey with small circular caps at both ends, flat vector UI style. The unfilled background rail for vertical sliders. Layer the blue vertical track on top to show fill amount in volume or scroll widgets.

A white/grey vertical slider section: a large white circle with soft grey outline and short vertical stubs above and below, flat vector UI style. Unfilled node segment for stepped vertical sliders. Tiles vertically as the empty step markers of a discrete slider.

A tall white/grey slider segment: a vertical light bar with a central circular node and connector stubs, outlined in grey, flat vector style. The unfilled tall middle piece for segmented vertical sliders. Used as the background of discrete vertical gauges or selectors.

A five-pointed star filled bright blue with a darker blue outline and subtle bottom shading, flat vector UI style. Classic rating/achievement star in its earned/filled state. Used for level-complete ratings, favorites, score stars, or achievement displays.

A five-pointed star in pale grey/white with a white inner outline, flat vector UI style. Represents an empty/unearned star state, matching the filled blue star. Used as the greyed-out placeholder in star rating rows or locked achievement displays.

A five-pointed pale grey star with a darker grey drop-shadow edge along the bottom giving a 3D depth/bevel look, flat vector UI style. An empty star variant with pressed-button style depth. Used as an unearned rating star matching depth-style buttons.

A wide white rounded-rectangle button with a thin grey outline and a subtle darker bottom edge giving a raised 3D depth look, flat vector UI style. Blank face ready for text or icons. Standard menu button for options, dialogs, or action bars.

A wide flat white rounded-rectangle button with a thin grey outline and no depth shading, flat vector UI style. A blank flat-state button face, essentially the pressed or flat variant of the depth button. Used for menu buttons, list items, or toolbar actions.

A circular white button with a thin grey outline and darker bottom edge creating a raised depth effect, flat vector UI style. Blank round face for an icon. Used for circular action buttons like pause, settings gear, or on-screen touch controls.

A flat circular white button with a thin grey outline and no depth shading, flat vector UI style. The flat/pressed variant of the round depth button. Useful for round icon buttons, radio-style selectors, or touch controls.

A square white button with rounded corners, thin grey outline, and a darker bottom edge giving a raised depth look, flat vector UI style. Blank square face for icons or single letters. Common for inventory slots, hotkey buttons, or grid menus.

A flat square white button with rounded corners and a thin grey outline, no depth shading, flat vector UI style. The flat/pressed variant of the square depth button. Used for inventory slots, keyboard-key displays, or grid-based menu buttons.

A very thin horizontal white/light grey line strip with uniform thickness, flat vector UI style. A simple separator rule only a few pixels tall. Used to divide sections in menus, lists, or settings panels.

A thin horizontal white separator line that tapers or fades at both ends, flat vector UI style. A softer decorative divider compared to the plain version. Used to separate headings or sections in menus with a lighter visual touch.

A solid black downward-pointing triangle (chevron/caret) icon, flat vector UI style with slightly rounded corners. Dark variant for use on light backgrounds. Used for dropdown menus, scroll-down indicators, decrement steppers, or collapse controls.

A solid white downward-pointing triangle (caret) icon with softly rounded corners, flat vector UI style. Light variant for dark backgrounds. Used for dropdowns, scroll-down hints, decrement buttons, or expanding panels.

A white downward-pointing triangle icon with a black outline border, flat vector UI style. The outlined variant reads clearly on any background. Used for dropdown carets, sort-descending indicators, or scroll-down prompts.

A solid black upward-pointing triangle (caret) icon with rounded corners, flat vector UI style. Dark variant for light backgrounds. Used for scroll-up buttons, increment steppers, sort-ascending indicators, or collapse controls.

A solid white upward-pointing triangle (caret) icon with rounded corners, flat vector UI style. Light variant for dark backgrounds. Used for scroll-up controls, increment buttons, or expand/collapse toggles.

A white upward-pointing triangle icon with a black outline border, flat vector UI style. Outlined variant visible on any background color. Used for sort-ascending markers, scroll-up buttons, or stepper increments.

A solid black right-pointing triangle play icon with rounded corners, flat vector UI style. Dark variant for light backgrounds. Used as a play/start button in media controls, level start buttons, or next/advance actions.

A solid white right-pointing triangle play icon with rounded corners, flat vector UI style. Light variant for dark backgrounds. Used for play/start buttons, resume actions, or forward navigation in game menus.

A white right-pointing triangle play icon with a black outline border, flat vector UI style. The outlined variant works on any background. Used for play/start/resume buttons and media or level-select controls.

A solid black circular arrow curving clockwise with an arrowhead, forming a repeat/refresh symbol, flat vector UI style. Dark variant for light backgrounds. Used for restart-level, retry, refresh, or loop-toggle buttons.

A solid white circular arrow curving clockwise with an arrowhead, a repeat/refresh symbol, flat vector UI style. Light variant for dark backgrounds. Used for retry, restart, reload, or loop controls in game menus.

A white circular clockwise arrow with a black outline border, the repeat/refresh symbol in flat vector UI style. Outlined variant readable on any background. Used for restart, retry, reload, or loop-toggle buttons.

A wide white rounded-rectangle text input field with a thin grey/lavender outline, flat vector UI style. Blank interior for typed text. Used as a text entry box for player names, chat, seeds, or search fields in menus.

A square white input field with rounded corners and a thin grey/lavender outline, flat vector UI style. Blank single-character sized entry box. Used for single-letter/digit inputs, PIN code cells, or small numeric fields.

A wide white rounded-rectangle input field with a very subtle light border, flatter and softer than the outline variant, flat vector UI style. Blank text entry surface. Used for name entry, chat boxes, or search bars in game UI.

A square white input field with rounded corners and a soft light border, flat vector UI style. Blank single-cell entry box, the softer-bordered version of the outlined square input. Used for PIN digits, single-character entry, or small grid inputs.

A wide white rounded-rectangle button with thin grey outline and darker bottom edge for a raised depth effect, flat vector UI style; this is the double-resolution (2x) version of the Default depth button. Blank face for text or icons. Standard high-res menu/action button.

A wide flat white rounded-rectangle button with a thin grey outline and no depth shading, flat vector UI style; the double-resolution (2x) version of the Default flat button. Blank face used for menu buttons, list entries, or pressed-state visuals at higher resolution.

A circular white button with a thin grey outline ring and a subtle drop-shadow 'depth' edge beneath it, giving a slightly raised 3D look. Clean flat vector UI style at double resolution. Good as a round icon button base (close, settings, action buttons) in menus or HUDs.

A flat circular white button with a grey line border and no depth shadow, appearing perfectly flush. Flat vector UI style. Suitable as a pressed/flat state for a round button or as a neutral circular icon container.

A rounded-corner square white button with a grey outline and a bottom depth shadow suggesting a raised, clickable surface. Flat vector UI style at double resolution. Useful as a square icon-button background, inventory slot, or keyboard-key style button.
A flat rounded square white panel with a grey line border and no depth edge. Clean flat vector UI style. Works as a pressed square-button state, inventory/hotbar slot, or generic small panel frame.
A very thin horizontal white bar (128x8) with slightly rounded ends, drawn in flat vector style. It is a simple separator line used to divide sections of a menu, list, or panel in game UI.

A thin horizontal white divider line that tapers or fades at both ends, giving softer edge caps than the plain divider. Flat vector UI style. Used as a decorative separator between menu sections or headings.

A solid black downward-pointing triangle arrow with softly rounded corners, in flat vector icon style. Typically used as a dropdown/expander chevron, scroll-down indicator, or decrement control on dark-on-light UI.

A solid white downward-pointing triangle arrow with rounded corners, flat vector icon style. The light variant for use on dark backgrounds, e.g. a dropdown indicator, scroll-down arrow, or minus/decrease stepper control.

A downward triangle arrow drawn as a white fill with a bold black outline, flat vector icon style. The outlined version reads well on any background; useful for dropdowns, sort indicators, or pointing markers above objects.

A solid black upward-pointing triangle arrow with rounded corners in flat vector icon style. Commonly used as a collapse/expand-up chevron, scroll-up button, or increment control on light backgrounds.

A solid white upward-pointing triangle arrow with rounded corners, flat vector icon style. Light variant for dark UI backgrounds; suits scroll-up buttons, collapse indicators, or plus/increase steppers.
An upward triangle arrow with white fill and a thick black outline, flat vector icon style. Works on any background color; usable as a collapse chevron, upvote arrow, or jump indicator.
A solid black right-pointing rounded triangle, the classic media play symbol, in flat vector icon style. Used on play/start buttons, resume controls, or as a forward indicator on light backgrounds.
A solid white right-pointing rounded play triangle in flat vector icon style. The light variant for dark buttons or overlays; typical for play/start/resume buttons in menus or cutscene skips.
A play triangle drawn as white fill with a bold black outline, flat vector icon style. Reads clearly on any background; useful for video/audio playback buttons or start-level buttons.

A solid black circular arrow curving clockwise with an arrowhead, forming a repeat/refresh loop symbol. Flat vector icon style. Used for restart-level, retry, reload, or loop-toggle buttons on light backgrounds.
A solid white circular clockwise arrow with an arrowhead, the repeat/refresh symbol, in flat vector icon style. Light variant for dark backgrounds; suits retry, restart, reload, or loop controls.

A circular clockwise repeat arrow drawn with white fill and a thick black outline, flat vector icon style. High-contrast version that works on any background; typical for restart/retry or loop-playback buttons.
A wide white rounded rectangle (384x128) with a doubled grey outline frame around it, flat vector UI style. Designed as a text input field or name-entry box with a focused/highlighted outline state.
A white rounded square with a doubled grey outline frame, flat vector UI style. Suits a single-character input cell, checkbox container, or focused state of a square input slot.
A wide white rounded rectangle with a thin grey border and no outer outline, flat vector UI style. A standard unfocused text input field, search bar, or name-entry box background.
A plain white rounded square with a thin grey border, flat vector UI style. Usable as a single-character input cell, checkbox background, or small square field in forms and PIN entries.

A chunky green right-pointing (east) triangle arrow with a darker green border and lighter top highlight, giving a bevelled, slightly pixel-chunky vector look. Suits next-page buttons, direction indicators, or map navigation east.

A smaller 24px version of the green east-pointing bevelled triangle arrow with darker outline. Same chunky green style; used for compact next/right controls like spinners, carousels, or small list navigation.

A chunky green upward-pointing (north) triangle arrow with dark green outline and light bevel highlight. Bold flat/bevelled vector style. Useful for scroll-up buttons, upgrade indicators, or map navigation north.
A small 24px green north-pointing bevelled triangle arrow with darker border. Compact variant for stepper up-buttons, small scroll arrows, or sort-ascending indicators.
A chunky green downward-pointing (south) triangle arrow with dark green outline and bevel shading. Bold vector style. Fits dropdown indicators, scroll-down buttons, or map navigation south.
A small 24px green south-pointing bevelled triangle arrow with darker border. Compact variant for stepper down-buttons, dropdown chevrons, or sort-descending indicators.
A chunky green left-pointing (west) triangle arrow with dark green outline and light bevel. Bold vector style. Used for back/previous buttons, page-left navigation, or map navigation west.
A small 24px green west-pointing bevelled triangle arrow with darker border. Compact back/previous control for carousels, spinners, or small pagination widgets.

A green right-pointing arrow with a stylized swept shape — a notched tail giving a chevron/dart silhouette — with dark green outline and bevel highlight. More ornamental than the basic triangle; good as a pointer cursor, quest marker, or fancy next button.

A green upward-pointing decorative arrow with a concave notched base creating a dart/chevron silhouette, dark green outline and light bevel. Ornamental up indicator for level-up markers, jump prompts, or stylized scroll-up buttons.

A green downward-pointing decorative arrow with a notched top edge forming a dart/heart-like chevron silhouette, dark green outline with bevel shading. Ornamental down indicator, e.g. a bobbing 'here' marker above objects or a stylized dropdown arrow.

A circular button in flat vector UI style with a green outer rim, a light grey inner face, and a darker bottom edge giving a 3D pressed-depth/drop-shadow look. Bright green and off-white dominate. Good as a raised round button base for icons in menus or HUD action bars.

A circular green button with a subtle vertical gradient shading (lighter top to slightly darker bottom) and a dark bottom lip for raised depth. Clean flat vector UI style. Suitable as a default-state round button in menus and dialogs.

A rounded square button with a green border, light inner face, and a darker bottom edge creating a raised 3D depth look. Flat vector style in green and off-white. Suits raised icon buttons or item slots that depress when clicked.

A solid bright green rounded square with a darker green bottom lip for a beveled 3D depth effect, no gloss or gradient. Flat vector cartoon UI style. Standard unpressed square button for menus, dialogs, or hotbar slots.

A green rounded square button with a lighter glossy highlight on the upper half and a darker bottom edge for depth. Two-tone green flat vector style. A polished raised button for main menus or mobile-style interfaces.
