A light grey/white rounded-square checkbox containing a green X/cross with a dark green outline. Flat vector UI style. Use for a declined/failed checkbox state, delete toggle, or incorrect-answer marker on a neutral base.

A light grey/white rounded-square checkbox containing a smaller green filled square with a darker green outline in its center. Flat vector UI style, reading as an indeterminate/partially-selected checkbox. Use for tri-state selection widgets or list multi-select UIs.

A standalone bold green checkmark/tick icon with a darker green outline on transparent background. Flat vector icon style. Use to mark completed quests, correct answers, owned items, or as a confirm button glyph.

A standalone filled green circle icon with a darker green outline, flat vector style on transparent background. A simple dot/bullet glyph. Use as a radio dot, bullet point, status indicator, or map marker.
A standalone bold green X/cross icon with a darker green outline, flat vector style on transparent background. Use as a close/cancel glyph, wrong-answer marker, or delete button icon.

A bold green checkmark/tick icon with a thick white outer outline, flat vector style on transparent background. The white halo keeps it readable over busy backgrounds. Use as a confirm/complete overlay on items, buttons, or world objects.

A filled green circle icon surrounded by a thick white outline, flat vector style on transparent background. The halo makes it stand out over any backdrop. Use as a selection dot, status light, or minimap marker.

A bold green X/cross icon with a thick white outer outline, flat vector style on transparent background. High readability over any background. Use as a close button glyph, error/deny marker, or removal indicator.

A filled green square icon with a thick white outer outline, flat vector style on transparent background. A simple halo-edged square glyph. Use as a stop icon, indeterminate mark, or generic shape marker in UI.

A standalone filled green square icon with a darker green outline, flat vector style on transparent background. A simple square glyph. Use as a stop button, bullet, indeterminate checkbox mark, or placeholder shape.

A green slider handle/knob shaped like a rounded pentagon or pointer (house/shield shape pointing up), lighter green fill with darker green outline. Flat vector UI style. Use as the draggable grabber on horizontal or vertical sliders for volume and settings.

A wide horizontal green slider track: a thin bar with small circular end caps and a circular node, drawn in bright green flat vector style. Use as the filled portion or full rail of a horizontal slider for volume, brightness, or stat bars.

A green slider track segment: a large circle with short horizontal bar stubs on both sides and a darker green outline. Flat vector UI style. Middle/notch section of a segmented horizontal slider, tileable with the wide sections to build tracks of any length.

A wider green horizontal slider segment: a central circle with longer bar arms extending left and right, dark green outline, flat vector style. Tileable middle piece for building longer segmented slider tracks or progress rails.

A wide horizontal white/light grey slider track: thin bar with circular end caps and a node, with a soft shadow, flat vector style. Represents the empty/unfilled rail of a horizontal slider, pairing with the green version as the filled portion.

A white/light grey slider track segment: a large circle with short horizontal bar stubs on each side and a soft grey shadow. Flat vector UI style. Empty-state notch section for segmented horizontal sliders, tiled to build neutral tracks.

A wider white/light grey horizontal slider segment: central circle with longer bar arms left and right and a soft shadow, flat vector style. Tileable empty middle piece for longer neutral slider tracks or progress rails.

A tall vertical green slider track: a thin bar with small circular caps at top and bottom, bright green flat vector style. Use as the filled rail of a vertical slider for volume, zoom, or scroll-style controls.
A green vertical slider segment: a large circle with short bar stubs above and below, dark green outline, flat vector style. Tileable middle/notch piece for building segmented vertical slider tracks.

A taller green vertical slider segment: a central circle with longer bar arms extending up and down, dark green outline, flat vector style. Tileable middle piece for longer vertical slider tracks or vertical progress meters.

A tall vertical white/light grey slider track: thin bar with circular caps at both ends and a soft shadow, flat vector style. Empty/unfilled rail of a vertical slider, pairing with the green filled version.
A white/light grey vertical slider segment: a large circle with short bar stubs above and below, soft grey shadow, flat vector style. Empty-state notch piece for segmented vertical sliders.

A taller white/light grey vertical slider segment: central circle with longer bar arms up and down, soft shadow, flat vector style. Tileable empty middle piece for longer neutral vertical slider tracks.

A large filled five-pointed star in bright green with a darker green bottom facet giving a slight bevel/depth, flat vector style. Use for score ratings, level completion stars, favorites, or collectible pickups.

A five-pointed star drawn as a light grey/white fill with a white outline, flat vector style. Represents an empty/unearned star in a rating display. Pairs with the filled green star to show earned vs unearned score stars.

A five-pointed star in light grey/white with a subtle darker grey lower facet giving a beveled depth look, flat vector style. An empty star variant with dimension for rating widgets. Use as the unearned star slot in level-results screens.

A white/light grey triangular arrowhead pointing right (east) with a soft grey shadow, flat vector style on transparent background. Use as a next/forward navigation button glyph, carousel arrow, or play icon.

A smaller white/light grey right-pointing (east) triangular arrow with soft shadow, flat vector style. Compact variant of the east arrow for tight UI spots like list expanders, breadcrumbs, or small next buttons.

A white/light grey triangular arrowhead pointing up (north) with a soft grey shadow, flat vector style on transparent background. Use for scroll-up buttons, increment spinners, sort-ascending indicators, or upward navigation.
A smaller white/light grey up-pointing (north) triangular arrow with soft shadow, flat vector style. Compact variant for spinner up-buttons, dropdown collapse indicators, or tiny scroll controls.

A white/light grey triangular arrowhead pointing down (south) with a soft grey shadow, flat vector style on transparent background. Use for scroll-down buttons, decrement spinners, dropdown indicators, or sort-descending markers.
A smaller white/light grey down-pointing (south) triangular arrow with soft shadow, flat vector style. Compact variant for dropdown chevrons, spinner down-buttons, or tiny scroll controls.

A chunky solid triangular arrowhead pointing left (west), in flat vector UI style with a soft white/light-grey fill and subtle outline on a transparent background. Simple wedge shape from the Kenney UI Pack grey theme. Suitable as a back/previous navigation button glyph or a carousel/menu paging arrow.

Smaller 24px variant of the basic left-pointing triangular arrow, flat vector style in white/light grey on transparency. Identical wedge shape to arrow_basic_w but scaled down. Useful for compact UI elements like small list steppers, spinner controls, or breadcrumb back indicators.

A stylized right-pointing (east) arrow with a decorative swept, chevron-like shape featuring a concave notch on its tail side, drawn in flat vector style with white/light-grey fill and outline. More ornamental than the basic wedge. Good for next/forward buttons, page-turn indicators, or directional prompts in menus.

Smaller 24px variant of the decorative east-pointing arrow with the swept concave tail, flat vector white/light grey on transparency. Same curved chevron silhouette at reduced size. Fits compact next/forward buttons, tooltips, or inline directional cues.

A decorative upward-pointing (north) arrow with swept curved sides and a concave notch at its base, giving a stylized dart-like silhouette; flat vector white/light-grey fill with outline. From the Kenney grey UI theme. Suits scroll-up indicators, upgrade/increase buttons, or map direction markers.

Smaller 24px version of the decorative north/up arrow with curved dart-like edges and notched base, flat vector white/grey on transparency. Useful for small spinner up-steppers, stat increment buttons, or subtle scroll cues.

A decorative downward-pointing (south) arrow with swept curved sides and a concave notch at the top, forming a stylized dart shape; flat vector style in white/light grey with soft outline. Ideal for scroll-down hints, dropdown indicators, or decrease buttons in a grey-themed UI.

Smaller 24px variant of the decorative south/down arrow with curved dart silhouette and notched top edge, flat vector white/grey on transparency. Fits compact dropdown carets, spinner down-steppers, or minimize indicators.

A decorative left-pointing (west) arrow with swept curved edges and a concave notch on the trailing side, flat vector style with white/light-grey fill and outline. Mirror of the decorative east arrow. Works as a back/previous button glyph or page-turn-left indicator.

Smaller 24px version of the decorative west/left arrow with the swept concave-tail silhouette, flat vector white/grey on transparency. Suits compact back buttons, list navigation, or inline previous-page cues.

A wide rounded-rectangle button (192x64) in flat vector style: medium grey fill surrounded by a thick white/light border, on transparency. Clean unpressed state with no depth shading. Standard menu or dialog button background, well suited to nine-slice stretching for labels like Play or Options.

A wide rounded-rectangle button with a medium grey inner fill, white border, and a raised 3D 'depth' bottom edge giving a pushable ledge look; flat vector UI art on transparency. Reads as an unpressed raised button. Good as the default state of a primary menu button that swaps to a flat version when pressed.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in pale grey/white with a solid flat face and a thicker bottom ledge creating a raised 3D depth effect; flat vector style on transparency. Uniform light fill with no gloss or border ring. Works as a raised default-state UI button for menus and HUD actions.

A wide rounded-rectangle raised button with a glossy face: a lighter highlight band across the top half and slightly darker lower half, plus a bottom depth ledge; flat vector white/grey palette. The shine suggests a polished, clickable surface. Ideal for prominent call-to-action buttons in a grey-themed menu.

A wide rounded-rectangle raised button whose face shades in a smooth vertical gradient from white at top to light grey at bottom, with a 3D bottom depth edge; flat vector style on transparency. Softer look than the gloss variant. Suits standard menu buttons where a subtle lit-from-above feel is wanted.

A wide rounded-rectangle raised button in pale grey with a thin inner outline/line inset around the face and a bottom depth ledge; flat vector UI style. The inset stroke gives a framed, bordered face without heavy contrast. Useful for secondary buttons or toggle-style options in menus.

A wide rounded-rectangle button (192x64) with a plain flat pale-grey/white fill and no depth ledge, gloss, or inner border; flat vector style on transparency. Reads as a pressed state or a minimalist idle button. Good as the pressed/active swap for depth variants, or as a clean label backing.

A wide rounded-rectangle button without a depth ledge whose face has a glossy two-tone split: brighter top half highlight over a slightly darker lower half; flat vector white/grey palette. Flat-height glossy variant, suitable as the pressed state of the depth_gloss button or a shiny toolbar button.

A wide rounded-rectangle button with no depth ledge and a smooth vertical white-to-light-grey gradient across its face; flat vector UI art on transparency. Subtle soft-lit appearance. Works as a pressed-state partner to the depth_gradient variant or as a low-emphasis menu button.

A wide rounded-rectangle button with a light grey face and a thin inner outline stroke inset from the edge, no depth ledge; flat vector style. The framed face gives a quiet, bordered look. Suits secondary/cancel buttons, list entries, or the pressed state of the depth_line variant.

A circular button (64x64) with a medium grey inner disc surrounded by a thick white ring border; flat vector UI style on transparency. Clean flat circle with no depth shading. Ideal backing for round icon buttons such as pause, settings gear, or ability slots.

A circular button with a medium grey face, white ring border, and a slight raised 3D depth edge at the bottom; flat vector white/grey palette. Reads as an unpressed round push-button. Good for icon buttons that visually depress when clicked, like HUD action or navigation buttons.

A circular button with a plain pale-grey/white flat face and a thicker bottom rim giving a raised depth look; flat vector style on transparency. No gloss or inner ring. Suits round icon buttons in their default raised state, e.g. inventory or map buttons.

A circular raised button whose face is split glossy-style with a brighter upper half and slightly darker lower half, plus a bottom depth rim; flat vector white/grey art. The shine implies a polished clickable widget. Nice for prominent round action buttons like confirm or jump.

A circular raised button with a smooth vertical gradient face shading from white at top to light grey at bottom, and a 3D bottom rim; flat vector UI style on transparency. Softly lit appearance. Works for standard round icon buttons across menus and HUD.

A circular raised button with a light grey face, a thin inner circular outline inset from the edge, and a bottom depth rim; flat vector style. The inset ring frames the face subtly. Suits secondary round buttons or toggles that pair with a flat pressed state.

A plain circular button with a uniform pale-grey/white flat fill, no border ring, gloss, or depth rim; flat vector art on transparency. Minimal disc shape reading as pressed or idle. Useful as a pressed-state swap for the round depth buttons or as a neutral icon backing.

A circular button without a depth rim whose face has a glossy horizontal split: bright white upper half over a slightly darker grey lower half; flat vector style. Flat-height glossy disc. Good pressed-state partner to depth_gloss or a shiny round toolbar button.

A circular flat-height button with a smooth white-to-light-grey vertical gradient face and no rim or ring; flat vector UI art on transparency. Subtle soft shading. Suits low-emphasis round buttons or the pressed state of the gradient depth variant.

A circular button with a medium grey face and a thin darker circular outline inset just inside its edge, no depth rim; flat vector style. Framed ring look at flat height. Works for secondary round buttons, radio-style selectors, or pressed states of the depth_line circle.

A rounded-corner square button (64x64) with a medium grey inner fill surrounded by a thick white border frame; flat vector UI style on transparency. Flat, unshaded face. Ideal for inventory slots, hotbar cells, or square icon buttons in a grey-themed interface.

A rounded square button with a medium grey face, white border frame, and a raised 3D bottom ledge; flat vector white/grey palette. Reads as an unpressed square push-button. Good default state for square icon buttons or toolbar cells that depress on click.

A rounded square button with a plain pale-grey/white flat face and a thicker bottom ledge providing a raised depth effect; flat vector style on transparency. No gloss or inner frame. Suits raised square icon buttons, hotbar keys, or dialog choices.

A rounded square raised button with a glossy face split into a brighter top half and slightly darker bottom half, plus a bottom depth ledge; flat vector white/grey art. Polished, clickable look. Fits prominent square action buttons such as confirm tiles or ability slots.

A rounded square raised button whose face shades in a smooth vertical gradient from white to light grey, finished with a 3D bottom ledge; flat vector UI style on transparency. Soft-lit neutral look. Works as a standard square menu or toolbar button.

A rounded square raised button with a light grey face, a thin inner square outline inset from its edge, and a bottom depth ledge; flat vector style. The inset stroke gives a quiet framed face. Suits secondary square buttons, option toggles, or keybind tiles.

A plain rounded square button with a uniform pale-grey fill and no ledge, gloss, or frame; flat vector art on transparency. Minimal tile reading as a pressed or idle state. Useful as the pressed swap for square depth buttons, or a neutral slot/tile background.

A rounded square button at flat height with a glossy two-tone face: bright white top half over a slightly darker grey bottom half; flat vector style on transparency. Shiny but unraised. Good pressed-state partner for depth_gloss or a polished inventory tile.

A rounded square flat-height button with a smooth vertical white-to-light-grey gradient face and no ledge or frame; flat vector UI art. Subtle soft shading gives gentle depth. Suits low-emphasis square buttons or pressed states of the gradient depth tile.

A rounded square button with a pale grey face and a thin darker inner outline inset just inside the edge, no depth ledge; flat vector style on transparency. Framed tile look at flat height. Works for secondary square buttons, selection frames, or checkbox-like slots.

A filled circle widget (32x32) with a medium grey inner disc and thick white outer ring, in flat vector style on transparency. In the grey theme the 'color' fill reads as a solid selected radio button state. Use as the checked/selected state of a radio button or round toggle.

A round check widget shown as a mostly uniform light grey/white disc with a soft ring edge, flat vector style on transparency. Reads as an empty or unchecked radio button. Use as the unselected state of round radio buttons or toggle indicators in menus.

A round check widget with a thick grey outer ring and a small bright white dot in its center, flat vector style on transparency. Concentric bullseye look. Reads as a selected radio button with an inner-dot indicator; use for chosen options in settings lists.

A round check widget drawn as a white outer ring with a medium grey filled dot in the center, concentric circle style in flat vector art on transparency. Inverse-contrast sibling of check_round_grey_circle. Use as a selected radio indicator or a target/point marker in UI.

A rounded square checkbox base (32x32) with a plain light grey face and soft white border, no glyph inside; flat vector style on transparency. Reads as an empty, unchecked checkbox. Use as the unchecked state background that a checkmark or cross overlay snaps into.

A rounded square checkbox with a bold grey checkmark (tick) glyph centered on its light grey/white face; flat vector UI style on transparency. Clearly reads as a checked/enabled state. Use for enabled settings toggles, task completion markers, or option confirmation.

A rounded square checkbox with a bold grey X (cross) glyph centered on its light face; flat vector style on transparency. Reads as a negative, disabled, or rejected state. Use for off-toggles, cancel/close markers, or indicating a failed or excluded option.

A rounded square checkbox with a smaller solid grey square glyph centered inside its lighter face; flat vector style on transparency. Reads as an indeterminate/partial-check state or a filled selection marker. Use for tri-state checkboxes or 'partially selected' list headers.

An empty rounded-square checkbox in the grey Kenney UI style: a pale lavender-grey fill with a white outer border and darker slate outline. Flat vector UI art, unchecked state. Ideal as the off state of a checkbox in settings or inventory toggle menus.

A rounded-square grey checkbox containing a bold dark-slate checkmark (tick). Flat vector UI style with pale lavender fill and white border. Used as the checked/on state of a checkbox in options or quest-tracking UI.

A rounded-square grey checkbox containing a bold dark-slate X (cross). Flat vector UI style, pale lavender fill with white border. Useful as a negative/disabled checkbox state or a close/cancel toggle in menus.

A rounded-square grey checkbox with a smaller white filled square inside, outlined in dark slate. Flat vector UI art in the pale lavender-grey palette. Commonly used as an indeterminate/partial checkbox state or a radio-style selection marker.

A small standalone white checkmark (tick) glyph with a soft grey outer edge on transparency. Flat vector icon, chunky rounded strokes. Used to mark completed tasks, confirm buttons, or checked options in game UI.
A small solid white filled circle glyph on transparency. Flat vector icon in the Kenney grey UI set. Works as a radio-button dot, bullet point, map marker, or slider indicator.
A small solid white X (cross) glyph with rounded stroke ends on transparency. Flat vector icon. Standard close, cancel, delete, or incorrect-answer indicator in game menus.

A checkmark (tick) glyph rendered as a white outline with a grey/transparent interior. Flat vector icon matching icon_checkmark but in hollow outline form. Useful for an unfilled or secondary confirm state, or over dark backgrounds.
A hollow circle drawn as a thick white ring outline on transparency. Flat vector icon. Works as an unselected radio button, target reticle, or ring marker in UI.
An X (cross) glyph drawn as a thick white outline with hollow interior on transparency. Flat vector icon with rounded lobes. Alternate close/cancel/delete icon for dark or busy backgrounds.
A hollow square drawn as a thick white outline with grey interior on transparency. Flat vector icon. Usable as an unselected checkbox glyph, stop-button outline, or selection frame element.
A small solid white filled square glyph on transparency. Flat vector icon. Standard stop button symbol, bullet marker, or filled selection indicator in game UI.

A slider handle (grabber) shaped like a rounded arch/shield pointing upward, pale lavender-grey fill with white outline. Flat vector UI piece; the filename's 'hangle' is a typo for handle. Dragged along slider tracks for volume or brightness settings.

A long thin horizontal slider track: a light grey bar with small circular end caps and a round node, drawn as a thin line connecting two dots. Flat vector UI art. Serves as the rail for a horizontal slider control such as volume or sensitivity.

A single square section of a horizontal slider track with a bulging circular node in the middle, pale lavender-grey. Flat vector UI tile meant to be composed/nine-sliced into longer slider rails. Represents a notch or filled segment of the slider.

A wide (2:1) segment of a horizontal slider track: a pale grey bar with a circular bulge node in the center. Flat vector UI tile for building longer slider rails or progress tracks with detent markers.

A long thin horizontal white slider rail drawn as a line with small circular caps at both ends. Flat vector UI art in bright white/grey. Used as the empty track of a horizontal slider in settings menus.
A single white square slider-track section with a large circular bulge in the middle. Flat vector UI tile in the brighter white-grey variant, composable into slider rails as a detent or fill segment.

A wide white horizontal slider-track segment with a circular node at the center, bar extending to both edges. Flat vector UI tile used to assemble longer bright-grey slider rails or progress bars with markers.
A long thin vertical slider rail: a white line with small circular caps at top and bottom on transparency. Flat vector UI art. Serves as the track for vertical sliders like scroll or volume columns.
A square section of a vertical slider track with a circular bulge node in the middle, pale lavender-grey. Flat vector UI tile for composing vertical slider rails with notch/detent markers.
A tall (1:2) vertical slider-track segment: a pale grey vertical bar with a circular bulge at its center. Flat vector UI tile for building longer vertical slider rails or gauge tracks.
A long thin vertical white slider rail drawn as a line with circular caps at both ends. Flat vector UI art, bright white variant. Empty track for a vertical slider or scroll control.

A square white vertical slider-track section dominated by a large circular bulge. Flat vector UI tile in the bright white-grey variant, used as a detent or fill segment when assembling vertical sliders.

A tall white vertical slider-track segment with a circular node in the middle and the bar running top to bottom. Flat vector UI tile for longer bright vertical slider rails or vertical progress gauges.

A five-pointed star with pale lavender-grey fill, white outline, and subtle shading facets giving a slight 3D beveled look. Flat vector UI art. Classic rating star, level-score pip, or achievement/favorite marker.

A five-pointed star drawn with a thick white outline and pale grey interior, flat with rounded points. Flat vector UI art. Typically the empty/unearned state in a star rating row or an unfavorited toggle.

A five-pointed star with a white outline, pale grey fill, and a darker drop-shadow edge along the bottom giving a pressed/depth effect. Flat vector UI art. Suits star ratings or reward displays where a subtle 3D style is wanted.

A large rounded triangular arrow pointing right (east), pale lavender-grey fill with thick white outline and soft grey border. Flat vector UI art at double resolution. Used for next-page navigation, right d-pad, play buttons, or carousel controls.

A smaller version of the rounded right-pointing (east) triangular arrow, pale grey fill with white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Suits compact next/forward buttons, list expanders, or small carousel arrows.

A large rounded triangular arrow pointing up (north), pale lavender-grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art, double resolution. Used for scroll-up buttons, up d-pad input, or increase-value spinners.
A smaller rounded up-pointing (north) triangular arrow with pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Fits compact scroll-up controls, sort-ascending indicators, or numeric steppers.

A large rounded triangular arrow pointing down (south), pale lavender-grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art, double resolution. Used for scroll-down buttons, dropdown indicators, or decrease-value spinners.
A smaller rounded down-pointing (south) triangular arrow with pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Fits compact dropdown carets, sort-descending indicators, or scroll-down buttons.

A large rounded triangular arrow pointing left (west), pale lavender-grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art, double resolution. Used for back/previous navigation, left d-pad, or carousel controls.
A smaller rounded left-pointing (west) triangular arrow with pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Suits compact back buttons, previous-page arrows, or list collapse controls.

A large stylized chevron-style arrowhead pointing right (east) with a concave notched back edge, pale grey fill and thick white outline. Flat vector UI art, more decorative than the basic triangle. Good for flashy next/advance buttons or direction indicators on maps.

A smaller decorative right-pointing (east) chevron arrowhead with notched tail, pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Suits compact stylized forward/next indicators or quest direction markers.

A large decorative arrowhead pointing up (north) with a concave notched bottom edge, like a stylized chevron; pale grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art. Useful for jump/up indicators, upgrade arrows, or stylized scroll-up buttons.
A smaller decorative up-pointing (north) chevron arrowhead with notched base, pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Fits compact upgrade indicators or stylized up-navigation buttons.

A large decorative arrowhead pointing down (south) with a concave notched top edge, resembling a stylized V/chevron; pale grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art. Good for drop/download indicators or stylized scroll-down buttons.
A smaller decorative down-pointing (south) chevron arrowhead with notched top, pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Suits compact stylized dropdown or scroll-down indicators.

A large decorative arrowhead pointing left (west) with a concave notched right edge, like a stylized chevron; pale grey fill with thick white outline. Flat vector UI art. Suits flashy back/previous buttons or map direction markers.
A smaller decorative left-pointing (west) chevron arrowhead with notched tail, pale grey fill and white outline. Flat vector UI icon. Fits compact stylized back/previous navigation controls.

A wide 3:1 rectangular button panel with a medium grey fill and a thick white border, flat with no depth shading. Flat vector UI art at double resolution, suitable for nine-slice scaling. Base for menu buttons or labeled panels in a grey theme.

A wide rectangular button with medium grey fill, white border, and a darker bottom edge creating a 3D pressed-depth look. Flat vector UI art, double resolution, nine-slice friendly. Standard raised menu button for a grey-themed interface.

A wide rectangular button in pale lavender-grey with a white outline and a darker bottom lip giving subtle depth, top surface flat and unshaded. Flat vector UI art, double resolution. Works as a default-state menu or dialog button, nine-slice scalable.

A wide rectangular button in pale grey with white outline, darker bottom depth edge, and a lighter glossy highlight band across the upper portion. Flat vector UI art, double resolution. A shiny raised button variant for main-menu or confirm actions, nine-slice scalable.

Wide rounded-rectangle button in the grey/white theme of the Kenney UI pack, flat vector style with a subtle top-to-bottom light gradient face and a darker lavender-grey bottom edge giving a 3D depth/drop-shadow look. Reads as an unpressed raised button. Ideal as a standard menu or dialog button background (e.g. Play, Options) in a clean UI.

Wide rounded-rectangle button, pale grey-white flat vector style with a thin outline and a darker bottom edge creating a raised depth effect. The face is mostly flat with a subtle border line detail. Useful as a neutral menu button or list-entry background in game UI.

Wide rounded-rectangle button in solid pale lavender-grey with a completely flat face and no depth edge or gloss. Minimal flat vector UI style. Works as a pressed/inactive button state or a flat modern menu button background.

Wide rounded-rectangle button with a glossy highlight: the top half is bright white and the bottom half a slightly darker grey, giving a shiny two-tone sheen. Flat vector UI style with a thin outline. Good as a hover/highlighted button state or a polished menu button.

Wide rounded-rectangle button with a smooth vertical gradient from white at the top to light grey at the bottom, no separate depth edge. Clean flat vector UI style. Suits a default button state or panel header in a light-themed game UI.

Wide rounded-rectangle button drawn as a pale face with a thin darker grey outline border and no depth or gloss. Flat, minimal vector UI style. Useful as an outlined secondary button, text-field frame, or unselected tab background.

Circular button with a medium lavender-grey filled center surrounded by a thick white ring border. Flat vector UI style in the grey theme. Works as a round icon button base, radio-button outer, or map marker background.

Circular button with a grey filled center, white ring border, and a darker offset bottom edge that gives a raised depth/shadow look. Flat vector UI style. Suits a round action button (e.g. mobile joystick or ability button) in its raised state.

Plain circular button with a flat pale grey-white face and a darker bottom depth edge, no gloss or gradient. Clean flat vector UI style. Good as a round icon-button background or an on-screen control pad button.

Circular button whose face is split into a bright white upper half and light grey lower half (gloss sheen), sitting on a darker depth edge. Flat vector UI style. Useful as a shiny raised round button, e.g. for a confirm or ability icon.

Circular button with a smooth white-to-grey vertical gradient face and a darker bottom depth edge for a raised look. Flat vector UI style in the grey theme. Fits as a default round button base for icons or toggles.
Circular button with a pale face, a thin inner outline ring, and a darker bottom depth edge. Flat, minimal vector UI style. Works as an outlined raised round button or a slot/marker base.

Simple flat circle in solid pale lavender-grey with a soft white rim, no gloss, gradient, or depth edge. Minimal flat vector UI style. Good as a pressed round button state, radio-button base, or plain circular badge.

Circular button with a glossy two-tone face: bright white top half and light grey bottom half, thin outline, no depth edge. Flat vector UI style. Suits a shiny round button or highlighted toggle in a light UI.

Circular button with a smooth vertical gradient from white to pale grey across the whole face, no separate depth edge. Clean flat vector UI style. Useful as a default round button background for icons.

Circular button drawn as a pale disc with a thin darker grey outline ring near the edge, flat face. Minimal flat vector UI style. Works as an outlined round button, empty radio button, or selection ring.

Rounded-corner square button with a medium lavender-grey filled center and a thick white border frame. Flat vector UI style in the grey theme. Ideal as an inventory slot, icon button base, or selected-tile frame.
Rounded square button with a grey filled center, white border frame, and a darker bottom depth edge giving a raised 3D look. Flat vector UI style. Good as a raised inventory slot or hotbar button.

Rounded square button with a flat pale grey-white face and a darker bottom depth edge, no gloss or border inset. Clean flat vector UI style. Suits a hotbar key, keyboard-key visual, or icon button base.

Rounded square button with a glossy two-tone face (white upper half, light grey lower half) over a darker depth edge. Flat vector UI style. Works as a shiny raised square button or highlighted inventory slot.

Rounded square button with a smooth white-to-grey vertical gradient face and a darker bottom depth edge. Flat vector UI style in the grey theme. Useful as a default raised square button or slot background.

Rounded square button with a pale face, thin darker outline inset, and a darker bottom depth edge for a raised look. Minimal flat vector UI style. Good as an outlined raised button or empty item slot.

Plain rounded square in flat pale lavender-grey with a soft white rim and no depth, gloss, or gradient. Minimal flat vector UI style. Suits a pressed square button state, inactive slot, or tile background.

Rounded square button with a glossy face split into a bright white top half and light grey bottom half, thin outline, no depth edge. Flat vector UI style. Useful as a shiny square button or highlighted slot.
Rounded square button with a smooth vertical white-to-pale-grey gradient across the face, no depth edge. Clean flat vector UI style. Works as a default square button background or panel tile.

Rounded square button drawn as a pale grey face with a thin darker grey outline border inset from the edge. Minimal flat vector UI style. Suits an outlined secondary button, empty inventory slot, or unselected tab.

Round checkbox/radio widget shown as a smooth circle with a white outer ring and pale grey fill, in flat vector UI style. This is the unchecked/empty circular state of the grey-theme check set. Use as a radio button or round toggle base in menus and settings screens.

Round checkbox/radio widget: a pale grey circle with a white rim, essentially an empty circular check element in the grey variant. Flat vector UI style. Works as an unchecked radio button or unselected round toggle.

Round radio button in selected state: outer white/grey ring with a darker grey ring and a white filled dot in the center. Flat vector UI style. Use as the checked state of a radio button or a target/selection indicator.

Round radio button in selected state with a solid medium-grey filled inner dot surrounded by a white ring. Flat vector UI style, grey theme. Suits a chosen radio option, bullet point, or record/status indicator.

Square checkbox widget: a rounded square with a white rim and pale grey flat face, empty (no mark). Flat vector UI style. This is the unchecked state of the square checkbox; use in settings menus and forms.

Square checkbox in checked state: rounded pale square containing a bold dark lavender-grey checkmark/tick with a white outline. Flat vector UI style. Use as the ticked state of a checkbox for options, quest completion, or confirmation.

Square checkbox containing a bold dark grey X/cross with a white outline on a rounded pale square. Flat vector UI style. Represents a negative/disabled checkbox state, a cancel toggle, or a failed/locked slot marker.

Square checkbox in partial/selected state: a rounded pale square with a smaller solid dark grey square outline/fill centered inside. Flat vector UI style. Useful as an indeterminate checkbox state or a stop/selection marker.
Empty square checkbox: rounded pale grey square with a soft white rim and flat face, no mark. Flat vector UI style, grey variant. Use as the unchecked checkbox state in menus and option lists.

Square checkbox in checked state, grey variant: a rounded pale square with a dark grey outlined checkmark/tick inside. Flat vector UI style. Suits ticked options, completed objectives, or confirmation toggles.

Square checkbox containing a bold dark grey X/cross mark, grey variant, on a rounded pale square. Flat vector UI style. Represents a rejected/disabled option, close/cancel toggle, or failed state indicator.

Square checkbox with a hollow dark grey square outline centered inside a rounded pale square. Flat vector UI style, grey variant. Works as an indeterminate/partially-selected checkbox state or a stop button glyph.

Standalone solid white checkmark/tick glyph with a subtle grey drop shadow, flat vector icon style. Bold rounded stroke angled up to the right. Use to indicate success, completion, confirmation, or an enabled setting anywhere in the UI.
Standalone solid white filled circle glyph with a soft grey shadow, flat vector icon style. A plain round dot shape. Useful as a bullet point, radio dot, status indicator light, or map marker.

Standalone solid white X/cross glyph with a subtle grey drop shadow, flat vector icon style with rounded stroke ends. Use as a close button, cancel/delete action, wrong-answer marker, or multiplication symbol.

Checkmark/tick glyph in outline style: medium grey fill with a thick white outline around it, flat vector icon. Reads well over busy backgrounds thanks to the outline. Use for success/complete indicators on HUDs or lists.

Solid medium-grey filled circle with a thick white outline ring, flat vector icon style. A high-contrast round dot glyph. Suits a radio indicator, bullet, token, or neutral status marker over varied backgrounds.

X/cross glyph with medium grey fill and a thick white outline, flat vector icon style with rounded ends. High contrast for use over any background. Works as a close/cancel button icon, error marker, or locked indicator.

Solid medium-grey filled square with a thick white outline border, flat vector icon style. A simple high-contrast square glyph. Useful as a stop button icon, checkbox indeterminate mark, or tile/selection marker.

Standalone solid white filled square glyph with a soft grey shadow, flat vector icon style. Plain rounded-corner square shape. Use as a stop icon, list bullet, empty slot marker, or generic placeholder glyph.

Slider handle/thumb shaped like a small vertical pointed tab (house/pentagon shape pointing up) in pale grey-white with a darker grey outline shadow. Flat vector UI style. Drag handle for horizontal sliders such as volume or brightness controls; the filename's 'hangle' is Kenney's spelling of handle.

Horizontal slider track: a long thin white bar with rounded ends and a circular knob node at the left end, drawn in flat vector style with a grey shadow. Represents a slider rail/progress line for settings like volume. Pairs with the slide handle sprite as the draggable control.

A square middle section of a horizontal slider track in Kenney's flat vector UI style, showing a light lavender-grey filled circle knob area with darker grey border and short track stubs extending left and right. Designed as a tileable center segment so the slider track can be stretched to any width. Useful as the filled/colored portion of a volume or settings slider in a game options menu.

A wide horizontal slider segment in flat vector style with a round lavender-grey knob circle in the center and thick track bars extending to both edges, all outlined in darker grey. It is the wider variant of the color section piece, meant to be tiled or nine-sliced into a longer slider bar. Fits a settings screen slider for volume, brightness, or similar values.

A complete horizontal slider in flat vector UI style: a thin white rail with small circular end caps and a round handle at each end, drawn on a long transparent strip. The thin light-grey/white line reads as the unfilled 'grey' state of the slider track. Use as the empty background rail of a settings slider under a draggable handle.

A square tileable section of a horizontal slider in flat vector style, showing a white circular knob spot with a grey outline and short white track stubs on either side. This is the unfilled 'grey' variant of the section piece. Useful as a repeating middle chunk when assembling a segmented slider or progress track in menus.

A wide unfilled slider segment in flat vector style: a white circle centered on a white horizontal bar with a soft grey drop-shadow outline. It is the wide tileable version of the grey horizontal slider section. Suited for building the empty portion of a stretched slider or scrubber bar in a game options UI.

A full-height vertical slider rail in flat vector style: a thin lavender-grey line with small circular caps at top and bottom on a tall transparent strip. This is the filled/colored rail variant oriented vertically. Use as the track for a vertical volume or scroll slider along the edge of a panel.

A square section of a vertical slider in flat vector style with a lavender-grey circular knob spot and thick track stubs extending up and down, outlined in darker grey. Tileable middle piece for the colored/filled portion of a vertical slider. Works for building vertical gauges or sliders of arbitrary height.

A tall vertical slider segment in flat vector style: a lavender-grey circle centered on a thick vertical bar with darker grey outline, twice the height of the square section. Wide (tall) tileable variant of the colored vertical slider section. Useful when assembling longer vertical sliders or level gauges in a game UI.

A full-height vertical slider rail in flat vector style: a thin white line with small circular end caps at top and bottom, with a subtle grey shadow, on a tall transparent strip. This is the unfilled grey/white rail variant. Serves as the empty background track for a vertical slider or scrollbar.

A square section of a vertical slider in flat vector style showing a white circular knob spot with grey-outlined white track stubs above and below. Unfilled grey variant of the vertical section piece, tileable vertically. Good for constructing the empty part of a segmented vertical slider or meter.

A tall vertical slider segment in flat vector style: a white circle centered on a thick white vertical bar with soft grey outline, double-height for tiling. Unfilled grey wide variant of the vertical slider section. Useful for building taller empty slider tracks or vertical progress bars in menus.

A five-pointed star in flat vector style with a subtle top-to-bottom gradient from white to light silver-grey and a grey outline, giving a faceted, slightly beveled look. Upright orientation with one point at the top. Classic rating or achievement icon, e.g. a filled star for level scores or favorites.

A five-pointed star outline in flat vector style: a thick white/light-grey border star with a transparent (empty) center and soft grey edge shadow. Represents the unearned or empty state of a star rating. Pairs with the filled star for score displays like 2-of-3 stars on a level results screen.

A five-pointed star in flat vector style filled solid light lavender-grey with a darker grey outline and a slight drop-shadow 'depth' offset at the bottom edge. Reads as a pressed or inactive star with a 3D lip. Useful as an alternate empty/disabled star state in rating widgets or as a decorative UI badge.

A bold red-and-crimson triangular arrowhead pointing right (east) in flat vector UI style, with a darker red outline and lighter red inner face. Simple solid triangle shape with slightly rounded corners. Typical use: next-page button, carousel navigation, or a 'go right' directional control.

A smaller version of the red right-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style, crimson outline with a lighter red fill. Same solid triangle shape as arrow_basic_e at 24px for compact layouts. Useful for small spinner controls, list expanders, or inline next indicators.

A bold red triangular arrowhead pointing up (north) in flat vector UI style, darker crimson outline with a lighter red inner triangle. Solid, slightly rounded equilateral triangle. Common uses: scroll-up button, increase-value stepper, or upward navigation icon.

A small red up-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style with crimson border and lighter red fill, 24px variant of arrow_basic_n. Compact solid triangle. Suits number steppers, sort-ascending indicators, or tiny scroll-up buttons.

A bold red triangular arrowhead pointing down (south) in flat vector UI style, with darker red outline and lighter red inner face. Solid inverted triangle with rounded corners. Typical use: scroll-down control, dropdown indicator, or decrease-value stepper button.

A small red down-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style, crimson outline with lighter red fill; 24px variant of arrow_basic_s. Compact inverted triangle. Good for dropdown carets, sort-descending markers, or small scroll-down buttons.

A bold red triangular arrowhead pointing left (west) in flat vector UI style, darker crimson outline with lighter red inner triangle. Solid shape with slightly rounded corners. Typical use: previous-page or back button, carousel left navigation.

A small red left-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style with crimson border and lighter red fill, the 24px version of arrow_basic_w. Compact solid triangle. Useful for inline back indicators, spinners, or list collapse controls.

A stylized red arrowhead pointing right (east) in flat vector style with a concave notched tail, giving it a chevron/dart look rather than a plain triangle; crimson outline with lighter red fill. More playful than the basic arrows. Suits map direction markers, tutorial pointers, or fancy next buttons.

A small red decorative right-pointing arrow in flat vector style: dart-like arrowhead with a notched back edge, crimson outline and lighter red fill at 24px. Compact chevron-dart shape. Good for inline pointers, breadcrumbs, or small navigation accents.

A stylized red arrowhead pointing up (north) in flat vector style with a concave notched bottom edge, forming a dart/chevron silhouette; dark crimson outline with lighter red fill. Decorative variant of the up arrow. Useful for jump indicators, upgrade markers, or tutorial 'look up' pointers.

A small red decorative up-pointing arrow in flat vector style, dart-shaped with a notched base, crimson outline and lighter red fill at 24px. Compact stylized chevron. Suits small upgrade badges, sort indicators, or inline up pointers.

A stylized red arrowhead pointing down (south) in flat vector style with a concave notched top edge, giving a heart-like dart silhouette; dark crimson outline with lighter red fill. Decorative variant of the down arrow. Good for 'drop here' markers, objective pointers hovering over targets, or fancy scroll-down cues.

A small red decorative down-pointing arrow in flat vector style: dart shape with a notched top, crimson outline and lighter red fill at 24px. Compact stylized down chevron. Useful for dropdown accents, loot markers, or small attention pointers.

A stylized red arrowhead pointing left (west) in flat vector style with a concave notched right edge, forming a dart/chevron silhouette; dark crimson outline with lighter red fill. Decorative variant of the back/left arrow. Suits stylized back buttons, map direction markers, or menu breadcrumbs.

A small red decorative left-pointing arrow in flat vector style, dart-shaped with a notched tail, crimson outline and lighter red fill at 24px. Compact stylized chevron. Good for inline back indicators or decorative previous-page controls.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector UI style with a light lavender-grey fill and a thin red border outline. Unpressed, outline-emphasis state. Ideal as a secondary or unselected menu button that pairs with solid red primary buttons; nine-slice friendly.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector style with light grey fill, red border, and a red bottom lip giving a 3D raised 'depth' look. Reads as an outlined button with a pressed-edge shadow. Useful as a hover/selected variant of the bordered menu button.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector style, solid bright red/crimson fill with a darker red bottom edge creating a raised 3D depth effect. Flat top face with no gloss or gradient. Classic primary action button for menus (Play, Confirm) with a satisfying pressable look.

A wide rounded-rectangle red button in flat vector style with a lighter glossy highlight band across the top half and a darker red bottom lip for 3D depth. Shiny candy-like appearance. Good for eye-catching primary buttons on title screens or reward popups.

A wide rounded-rectangle red button in flat vector style with a subtle vertical gradient from lighter to deeper red plus a darker bottom edge for 3D depth. Softer than the gloss variant. Suits polished menu buttons where a slight sheen is wanted without a hard highlight.

A wide rounded-rectangle red button in flat vector style with a thin lighter red inner outline inset from the edge and a darker red bottom lip for depth. The inner line gives a framed, tailored look. Works as a highlighted or focused state for menu buttons.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector style, uniform solid red/crimson fill with no depth lip, gloss, or border. The simplest flat state of the red rectangle button family. Ideal as a pressed-state sprite or a minimal flat-design menu button; nine-slice friendly.

A wide rounded-rectangle red button in flat vector style with a lighter glossy highlight across the top half but no bottom depth lip. Shiny two-tone red look in a flat profile. Suits pressed states of the glossy depth button or standalone shiny UI buttons.

A wide rounded-rectangle red button in flat vector style with a smooth vertical gradient from lighter red at top to deeper red at bottom, without a depth lip. Soft polished look in a flat profile. Useful as a pressed-state companion to the gradient depth button or as a subtle menu button.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector style with a light lavender-grey fill and a thin inset outline just inside the edge. Flat profile with a framed look and no red fill. Works as a disabled, secondary, or unselected button state alongside the red variants.

A circular button in flat vector UI style with a light lavender-grey face and a red ring border, plus a soft white rim. Unpressed outline-style round button. Ideal for icon buttons (pause, settings, close) where the icon is overlaid on the neutral face.

A circular button in flat vector style with a light grey face, red ring border, and a red bottom lip creating a raised 3D depth effect. Outline-style round button with pressable depth. Good as the hover or default state of a circular icon button in HUDs and menus.

A circular button in flat vector style, solid bright red fill with a darker red bottom lip giving a 3D raised look; flat top face with no gloss. Classic pressable round action button. Suits HUD action buttons like attack, jump, or confirm on touch controls.

A circular red button in flat vector style with a lighter glossy highlight on the upper half and a darker red bottom lip for 3D depth. Candy-like shiny round button. Eye-catching choice for primary HUD or popup action buttons.

A circular red button in flat vector style with a subtle vertical gradient from lighter to deeper red and a darker bottom lip for 3D depth. Softer sheen than the gloss version. Works as a polished round action or icon button in menus and HUDs.

A circular button in flat vector style with a light lavender-grey face, a thin red inner ring outline, and a soft outer rim suggesting a depth edge. Framed round button look. Useful as a focused or selected state for circular icon buttons.

A circular button in flat vector style, uniform solid red/crimson fill with no gloss, gradient, or depth lip. The simplest flat state of the round red button family. Ideal as a pressed-state sprite or a minimal flat-design icon button base.

A circular red button in flat vector style with a lighter glossy highlight across the top half and no depth lip, giving a shiny two-tone flat disc. Pressed-state companion to the glossy depth round button. Suits shiny HUD icon buttons or badge backgrounds.

A circular red button with a subtle vertical gradient from lighter pink-red at the top to deeper red at the bottom, outlined with a darker red rim. Flat vector UI style from the Kenney UI pack. Good as a round action button, close/confirm button, or radial menu node in a game HUD.

A circular button with a light grey-white fill and a thin red outline ring inset from a white outer border. Flat vector UI style, reading as an unfilled or secondary-state round button. Useful as an inactive radio button, toggle-off state, or secondary circular action button.

A square button with slightly rounded corners, light lavender-grey fill and a bold red border frame. Flat vector UI style. Works as a selected/highlighted inventory slot, a bordered panel button, or a keyboard-key display.

A square button with a light grey face, red border, and an extra darker red band along the bottom edge giving a 3D pressed-depth look. Flat vector UI style. Suits a raised menu button or item slot where a pushed/unpushed state pair is wanted.

A solid red square button with rounded corners and a darker red strip along the bottom edge suggesting depth/extrusion, with a flat uniform face. Flat vector UI style. Ideal as a primary menu button or hotbar key with a 3D raised look.

A red square button with rounded corners, a lighter glossy highlight band across the upper half, and a darker bottom edge for 3D depth. Flat vector UI style with a shiny candy-like finish. Good for arcade-style menu buttons or shop purchase buttons.

A red square button with rounded corners, a smooth top-to-bottom gradient face, and a darker red lower edge that gives a raised 3D depth effect. Flat vector UI style. Suitable as a primary call-to-action button in menus or dialogs.

A square button with a light grey face outlined in white/grey, a thin red inner line border, and a darker shadow edge at the bottom for depth. Flat vector UI style, reading as an outlined or secondary-state raised button. Useful for toggle-off buttons or neutral menu options.

A plain solid red square button with rounded corners and a slightly darker red outline, completely flat with no gloss or depth. Flat vector UI style. A versatile base for menu buttons, inventory slots, or nine-slice panel pieces.

A red square button with rounded corners and a lighter pink glossy highlight covering the top half, no bottom depth edge. Flat vector UI style with a shiny finish. Works for candy/arcade-styled menu buttons or badge backgrounds.

A red square button with rounded corners and a smooth vertical gradient from lighter red at top to deeper red at bottom, without a depth edge. Flat vector UI style. Good general-purpose menu or dialog button background.

A square button with a light grey fill, white outer edge, and a thin red inner line border, fully flat. Flat vector UI style, reading as an outlined/secondary or deselected button. Useful for inactive tabs, empty slots, or ghost buttons.
A filled red circle with a darker red outline, the colored/checked state of a round checkbox or radio button. Flat vector UI style. Use as the selected state of a radio button or a filled status dot.
An empty light grey circle with a white/grey outline, the unchecked state of a round checkbox or radio button. Flat vector UI style. Use as the deselected radio button or an empty status indicator.

A grey-outlined circle containing a smaller filled red circle in its center, a selected radio button on a neutral grey base. Flat vector UI style. Classic radio-button-selected indicator for options menus.

A red filled circle with a white ring inside it, a selected radio button rendered entirely on the red-colored base. Flat vector UI style. Alternative selected-radio or target-like indicator for menus in a red theme.

A solid red rounded square with a darker red outline and no inner mark, the empty base of the colored square checkbox. Flat vector UI style. Use as an unchecked (but themed) checkbox background or a small colored tile.

A red rounded-square checkbox containing a bold white-outlined red checkmark/tick. Flat vector UI style. The checked-true state of a checkbox, also usable as a confirm/success toggle in settings menus.
A red rounded-square checkbox containing a white-outlined red X/cross mark. Flat vector UI style. Represents a checked-false, disabled, or 'no' state; also usable as a small close/cancel button.
A red rounded-square checkbox containing a smaller white-outlined red square in its center. Flat vector UI style. An indeterminate/partial checkbox state or a stop-style toggle indicator.
An empty light grey rounded square with a white/grey outline, the neutral unchecked checkbox base. Flat vector UI style. Standard unchecked checkbox for options and settings menus.

A light grey rounded-square checkbox containing a red checkmark/tick with a dark red outline. Flat vector UI style. The checked state of the neutral checkbox variant, good for settings toggles or quest-complete lists.
A light grey rounded-square checkbox containing a red X/cross with a dark red outline. Flat vector UI style. A 'no/false/disabled' checkbox state, or a compact close/delete button on a neutral base.
A light grey rounded-square checkbox containing a smaller filled red square in its center. Flat vector UI style. An indeterminate/partially-selected checkbox state or a stop-button style indicator.

A standalone chunky red checkmark/tick glyph with a darker red outline on transparent background, roughly 20x18 px. Flat vector icon style. Use as a confirm/yes/success icon on buttons, completed quest markers, or list bullets.
A small solid red circle with a darker red outline on transparent background, 16x16 px. Flat vector icon style. Useful as a bullet point, status dot, radio glyph, or notification indicator.
A standalone bold red X/cross glyph with a darker red outline on transparent background, 18x18 px. Flat vector icon style. Use as a close, cancel, delete, or 'wrong answer' icon in menus and dialogs.

A red checkmark/tick glyph with a thick white outline on transparent background, 20x18 px. Flat vector icon style; the white edge keeps it readable over busy or dark backgrounds. Use for confirm buttons, task-complete overlays, or map markers.

A small red filled circle with a thick white outline on transparent background, 16x16 px. Flat vector icon style. Works as a high-contrast bullet, map ping, or selection dot over game-world backgrounds.

A bold red X/cross glyph with a thick white outline on transparent background, 18x18 px. Flat vector icon style with high contrast for readability over any backdrop. Use as a close button icon, error marker, or forbidden-action overlay.
A small red filled square with a thick white outline on transparent background, 16x16 px. Flat vector icon style. Useful as a stop icon, high-contrast bullet, or minimap marker.
A small solid dark-red bordered red square glyph on transparent background, 16x16 px. Flat vector icon style. Works as a stop button icon, list bullet, or placeholder swatch.

A red pentagon/home-plate shaped slider handle (pointed top, flat bottom) with a darker red outline, 24x32 px vertical orientation. Flat vector UI style. Grab handle for a horizontal slider such as volume or brightness controls.

A long thin horizontal red bar (96x16) with small circular end caps and a round knob node, resembling a slider track with handle in red. Flat vector UI style. Use as a filled slider track or progress rail in settings menus.

A small 16x16 red slider piece: a filled circular knob on a short horizontal bar segment, used as the middle/section tile of a segmented slider track. Flat vector UI style. Tile it to build custom-length red slider tracks or use as a detented stop marker.

A 32x16 red slider segment: a circular knob centered on a wider horizontal bar that extends to both sides. Flat vector UI style. A wide middle section for assembling segmented red slider tracks with notch points.

A long thin horizontal white/grey bar (96x16) with rounded end caps and a circular knob node, the neutral/unfilled version of the slider track. Flat vector UI style. Use as the empty background rail of a slider or progress bar.

A small 16x16 white/grey slider piece: a soft filled circular knob on a short horizontal bar segment, the neutral middle tile of a segmented slider. Flat vector UI style. Tile it for unfilled portions of custom slider tracks.

A 32x16 white/grey slider segment with a circular knob centered on a wider horizontal bar. Flat vector UI style, slightly soft/blurry edges from the light coloring. Wide neutral middle section for segmented slider tracks.

A long thin vertical red bar (16x96) with rounded end caps and a circular knob node, a vertical slider track in the red theme. Flat vector UI style. Use for vertical volume sliders, scrollbars, or elevator-style gauges.

A 16x16 red slider piece: a filled circular knob on a short vertical bar segment, the middle tile of a segmented vertical slider. Flat vector UI style. Tile vertically to build red slider or gauge tracks of any length.
A 16x32 red slider segment: a circular knob centered on a taller vertical bar extending above and below. Flat vector UI style. Tall middle section for assembling segmented vertical red slider tracks.

A long thin vertical white/grey bar (16x96) with rounded end caps and a circular knob node, the neutral vertical slider track. Flat vector UI style. Use as the unfilled background rail of a vertical slider or scrollbar.

A 16x16 white/grey slider piece: a soft circular knob on a short vertical bar segment, the neutral middle tile of a segmented vertical slider. Flat vector UI style. Tile it for unfilled portions of vertical tracks.
A 16x32 white/grey slider segment with a circular knob centered on a taller vertical bar. Flat vector UI style with soft light edges. Tall neutral middle section for segmented vertical slider tracks.

A filled five-pointed red star with a lighter red top facet and a darker red base shadow giving a slight 3D depth. Flat vector UI style. Classic rating/score star for level results, favorites, or achievement displays.

A five-pointed star with a light grey fill and white outline, the empty/unearned counterpart to the filled red star. Flat vector UI style. Use for unearned rating stars in level-complete screens or locked favorites.

A five-pointed star in light grey with a white outline and a darker grey lower edge adding subtle 3D depth. Flat vector UI style. An empty/inactive rating star with depth shading to match the depth-style buttons.

A large solid triangular arrowhead pointing east (right), drawn in flat vector UI style with a crimson-red fill and a lighter pink inner outline giving a soft double-border look. Rounded corners keep it friendly and readable at small sizes. Useful as a next/forward button, carousel navigation, or a play-style directional indicator in menus.

Smaller variant of the east-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style, crimson-red fill with a lighter pink inset outline and rounded corners. Identical shape to the large version, just scaled down (48px). Suited to compact UI like spinner steppers, pagination, or list scroll buttons.

A large solid triangle pointing north (up), flat vector UI style with crimson-red fill and a lighter pink double-border outline, rounded corners. Reads clearly as an upward directional control. Good for scroll-up buttons, value increment steppers, or sort-ascending indicators.

Smaller 48px variant of the north-pointing triangular arrow, flat vector style with crimson fill and lighter pink inset outline. Compact and crisp for tight UI layouts. Useful on spinners, dropdown collapse indicators, or mini scroll controls.

A large solid triangle pointing south (down), flat vector UI style, crimson-red with a lighter pink double outline and rounded corners. Clear downward directional glyph. Works for scroll-down buttons, dropdown expand indicators, or decrement controls.

Smaller 48px variant of the south-pointing triangular arrow in flat vector style, crimson fill with lighter pink inset border. Compact downward pointer for dense UI. Good for dropdown carets, spinner decrement buttons, or list scroll-down arrows.

A large solid triangular arrowhead pointing west (left), flat vector UI style with crimson-red fill and lighter pink double-border outline, rounded corners. Mirror of the east arrow. Ideal as a back/previous button, carousel left navigation, or menu return control.

Smaller 48px variant of the west-pointing triangular arrow, flat vector style, crimson fill with lighter pink inset outline. Compact left-facing pointer. Suits pagination previous buttons, small back controls, or stepper decrease arrows.

A stylized chevron-like arrow pointing east (right) with a concave notched tail, giving it a swept dart or cursor look; flat vector style in crimson red with a lighter pink double outline. More ornamental than the basic triangle. Good for emphasized next/advance buttons, quest direction markers, or decorative menu pointers.

Smaller 48px variant of the decorative east-pointing dart arrow, flat vector crimson red with lighter pink inset outline and notched tail. Compact swept pointer with more flair than the basic arrow. Useful for small forward indicators, list bullets, or selection cursors.

A stylized upward (north) arrow with a notched concave base, resembling a dart or navigation cursor; flat vector crimson red with lighter pink double outline. More dynamic silhouette than the plain triangle. Suits jump/up indicators, upgrade markers, or map compass pointers.

Smaller 48px variant of the decorative north-pointing dart arrow, flat vector crimson with lighter pink inset outline and notched base. Compact stylized up pointer. Good for small upgrade arrows, stat-increase icons, or minimap direction markers.

A stylized downward (south) arrow with a notched concave top, dart-like silhouette; flat vector crimson red with lighter pink double outline. More ornamental than the basic triangle. Useful for drop/download indicators, stat-decrease icons, or an above-character location marker.

Smaller 48px variant of the decorative south-pointing dart arrow, flat vector crimson with lighter pink inset outline and notched top edge. Compact stylized down pointer. Suits small drop indicators, sort-descending glyphs, or map pins pointing at objects.

A stylized chevron-like arrow pointing west (left) with a concave notched tail, swept dart silhouette; flat vector crimson red with lighter pink double outline. Mirror of the decorative east arrow. Good for emphasized back buttons, rewind controls, or decorative previous-page pointers.

Smaller 48px variant of the decorative west-pointing dart arrow, flat vector crimson with lighter pink inset outline and notched tail. Compact stylized left pointer. Useful for small back indicators, breadcrumb separators, or selection cursors facing left.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in flat vector UI style: a crimson-red outer border framing a pale lavender-white inner panel. The light interior makes it read as an outlined or secondary-state button. Ideal as a menu button background, text-input frame, or unselected tab that pairs with the solid-red variants.

A wide rounded-rectangle button with a red border, pale lavender-white face, and a darker bottom lip creating a 3D pressed-depth or drop-shadow effect; flat vector style. The depth edge makes it look raised and clickable. Good as a primary menu button base with an outlined/light face, or a hoverable list entry.

A wide rounded-rectangle button fully filled with flat crimson red and a darker red bottom edge that gives a raised 3D depth look; flat vector UI style with no gloss or gradient. Strong, saturated call-to-action shape. Ideal for primary buttons like Play, Confirm, or Buy in a game menu.

A wide rounded-rectangle crimson button with a lighter glossy highlight band across the top half and a darker bottom depth lip, flat vector style with a subtle shine. The gloss gives a candy-like polished look. Suits arcade-style primary buttons or shiny menu bars.

A wide rounded-rectangle button filled with a vertical red gradient (lighter at top, deeper at bottom) plus a darker bottom edge for 3D depth; flat vector UI style. Softer shading than the gloss variant. Works as a polished primary button or dialog action bar background.

A wide rounded-rectangle button with a pale lavender-white face, thin red outline, and a darker depth edge at the bottom; flat vector style. A light, minimal 'line' styling with raised feel. Good for secondary buttons, input fields, or unselected options alongside solid-red primaries.

A wide rounded-rectangle button in solid flat crimson red with no depth edge, gloss, or gradient; clean minimal flat vector UI style. The simplest full-color rectangular button state. Useful as a pressed/active button state, banner strip, or flat modern menu button.

A wide rounded-rectangle crimson button with a lighter pink glossy highlight across its top half, no bottom depth lip; flat vector style with a shiny two-tone look. Reads as a polished, pressed-flat glossy button. Suits arcade menus, HUD buttons, or hover states of the depth-gloss version.
